  22                             @ '    body'

.wizzi/ittf/examples/json/step_1.js.ittf

Fragments

  • common\example\repo
  • f_cb_test 
                                

   1 module
   2     kind jsfile
   3     $
   4         var opt = {
   5             level: 0,
   6             step: 1,
   7             name: 'Json_Step_1',
   8             title: 'Json - step - 1 - FsJson',
   9             folderLevel: 2
  10         }
  11     common\example\repo( &opt)
  12         $append functions
  13             function dump
  14                 param fsJson
  15                 _ printValue
  16                     @ 'fsJson.items'
  17                     @ fsJson.items
  18                 _ printValue
  19                     @ 'fsJson.documents'
  20                     @ fsJson.documents
  21         _ heading1('start')
  22         var fsJson = new json.FsJson()
  23         _ dump
  24             @ fsJson
  25         _ fsJson.insertItem
  26             {
  27                 @ basename 'alpha.js.ittf'
  28                 @ dirname 'w:/zero'
  29                 @ kind 1
  30             f_cb_test( result )
  31                 log 'insert.alpha.js.ittf.result', result
  32                 var insertedId = result.insertedId
  33                 _ dump
  34                     @ fsJson
  35                 set result.item.basename = 'beta.js.ittf'
  36                 _ fsJson.updateItem
  37                     @ result.item
  38                     f_cb_test( result )
  39                         log 'update.beta.js.ittf.result', result
  40                         _ dump
  41                             @ fsJson
  42                         _ fsJson.writeDocument
  43                             @ result.item._id
  44                             @ 'My content'
  45                             f_cb_test( result )
  46                                 log 'write.beta.js.ittf.result', result
  47                                 _ dump
  48                                     @ fsJson
  49                                 _ fsJson.readDocument
  50                                     @ result.item._id
  51                                     f_cb_test( result )
  52                                         log 'read.beta.js.ittf.result', result
  53                                         _ fsJson.deleteItem
  54                                             @ insertedId
  55                                             f_cb_test( result )
  56                                                 log 'delete.beta.js.ittf.result', result
  57                                                 _ dump
  58                                                     @ fsJson

  19                     @ 'fsJson.documents'

  21         _ heading1('start')
  22         # create an array of document data for test
  23         var documents = []
  24         _ documents.push
  25             {
  26                 @ path 'c:/root/folder1/index.html.ittf'
  27                 @ content
  28                     [
  29                         @ 'html'
  30                         @ '    body'
  31                         @ '        ul'
  32                         @ '            lia( stefi )'
  33                         @ '            lia_img( annie, photo.jpg )'
  34                         ._ join('\n')
  35         _ documents.push
  36             {
  37                 @ path 'c:/root/folder1/t/lia.html.ittf'
  38                 @ content
  39                     [
  40                         @ 'li'
  41                         @ '    a'
  42                         @ '        href'
  43                         ._ join('\n')
  44         _ documents.push
  45             {
  46                 @ path 'c:/root/folder1/t/lia_img.html.ittf'
  47                 @ content
  48                     [
  49                         @ 'li'
  50                         @ '    a'
  51                         @ '        href'
  52                         @ '        img'
  53                         ._ join('\n')
  54         _ json.createJsonFsData
  55             @ documents
  56             f_cb_throw( jsonFsData)
  57                 _ heading2('created JsonFilesystem')
  58                 _ printValue
  59                     @ jsonFsData
  60                 _ addDocuments
  61                     @ jsonFsData
  62         function addDocuments
  63             param jsonFsData
  64             _ heading2('write documents to JsonFilesystem')
  65             var documents = []
  66             _ documents.push
  67                 {
  68                     @ path 'c:/root/folder2/index.html.ittf'
  69                     @ content
  70                         [
  71                             @ 'module'
  72                             @ '    kind react'
  73                             ._ join('\n')
  74             _ json.addToJsonFsData
  75                 @ jsonFsData
  76                 @ documents
  77                 f_cb_throw( jsonFsData)
  78                     _ printValue
  79                         @ jsonFsData
  80                     _ extractDocuments
  81                         @ jsonFsData
  82         function extractDocuments
  83             param jsonFsData
  84             _ heading2('read documents from JsonFilesystem')
  85             var doc
  86                 _ json.createDocumentManager
  87                     @ jsonFsData
  88             _ doc.getFiles
  89                 @ 'c:/'
  90                 {
  91                     @ deep true
  92                     @ documentContent true
  93                 f_cb_throw( files )
  94                     _ printValue
  95                         @ files

  39                             _ stream.write('Welcome\n')

  42                                     _ printValue
  43                                         @ 'result'

  59                             @ deep true
  60                             @ documentContent true

.wizzi/ittf/examples/t/folder_data.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     var baseFolder = 'c:/wz/users/docexample'
   3     var folder_1_path
   4         _ path.join
   5             @ baseFolder
   6             @ 'folder1'
   7     var folder_1_sub_1_path
   8         _ path.join
   9             @ baseFolder
  10             @ 'folder1'
  11             @ 'sub1'
  12     var folder_2_path
  13         _ path.join
  14             @ baseFolder
  15             @ 'folder2'
  16     var folder_3_path
  17         _ path.join
  18             @ baseFolder
  19             @ 'folder3'
  20     var file_1_path
  21         _ path.join
  22             @ folder_1_path
  23             @ 'hello.js.ittf'
  24     var file_2_path
  25         _ path.join
  26             @ folder_1_path
  27             @ 'hello2.js.ittf'
  28     var file_3_path
  29         _ path.join
  30             @ folder_1_path
  31             @ 'hello3.js.ittf'
  32     var file_4_path
  33         _ path.join
  34             @ folder_1_sub_1_path
  35             @ 'hello_sub1.js.ittf'
  36     var file_5_path
  37         _ path.join
  38             @ folder_2_path
  39             @ 'hello2.js.ittf'
  40     var file_6_path
  41         _ path.join
  42             @ folder_2_path
  43             @ 'hello3.js.ittf'
  44     var file_7_path
  45         _ path.join
  46             @ folder_2_path
  47             @ 'hello4.js.ittf'

.wizzi/ittf/examples/t/mongo_connect.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_test
  • f_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     var FSITEMS = 'fsitems'
   3     var DOCUMENTS = 'documents'
   4     var fsmongo, doc
   5     function mongoConnect
   6         param callback
   7         _ MongoClient.connect
   8             @ 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test'
   9             f_cb_test( db )
  10                 set fsmongo = new FsMongo(db)
  11                 set doc = new Document(fsmongo)
  12                 _ db.collection(FSITEMS).drop
  13                     f_cb( result )
  14                         log 'FSITEMS.drop result', result
  15                         _ db.collection(DOCUMENTS).drop
  16                             f_cb( result )
  17                                 log 'DOCUMENTS.drop result', result
  18                                 return
  19                                     _ callback
  20                                         @ null
  21                                         {
  22                                             @ fsmongo fsmongo
  23                                             @ doc doc

.wizzi/ittf/lib/json/fs/t/fsjson/deleteItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb
  • r_cb
  • r_cb_wz_err 
                                

   1 $group
   2     m deleteItem
   3         { id
   4         callback
   5         var that = this
   6         _ this.getItemById
   7             @ id
   8             f_cb( fsitem )
   9                 if fsitem == null
  10                     r_cb_wz_err( JsonRepoError,  deleteItem )
  11                         @ 'FsJson item not found: ' + id
  12                 _ that._deleteDocument
  13                     @ id
  14                     f_cb( r )
  15                         _ that.items.deleteOne
  16                             {
  17                                 @ _id id
  18                             f_cb( r )
  19                                 # log '*** wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.deleteItem,r', r
  20                                 if r.deletedCount == 1 && r.result.ok == 1
  21                                     r_cb()
  22                                         {
  23                                             @ code 'FSITEM_DELETED'
  24                                             @ deletedCount r.deletedCount
  25                                             @ ok r.ok
  26                                 else
  27                                     r_cb_wz_err( JsonRepoError,  deleteItem )
  28                                         @ 'FsJson error deleting item. Result: ' + util.inspect( r )
  29     m _deleteDocument
  30         param id
  31         param callback
  32         _ this.documents.deleteOne
  33             {
  34                 @ _id id
  35             f_cb( r )
  36                 # log '*** wizzi-repo.json.FsJson._deleteDocument.r', r
  37                 if r.deletedCount == 1 && r.result.ok == 1
  38                     # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson._deleteDocument', true
  39                     r_cb( true)
  40                 else
  41                     # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson._deleteDocument', false
  42                     r_cb( false)

.wizzi/ittf/lib/json/fs/t/fsjson/getItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb
  • r_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     m getItem
   3         { key
   4             optional
   5         callback
   6         if key == null
   7             return
   8                 _ this.items.find
   9                     ._ toArray
  10                         @ callback
  11         _ this.items.find
  12             @ key
  13             ._ toArray
  14                 f_cb( r )
  15                     # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.getItem.r', key, r
  16                     if r.length == 1
  17                         r_cb( r[0] )
  18                     else
  19                         r_cb( null )
  20     m getItemById
  21         { id
  22         callback
  23         _ this.getItem
  24             {
  25                 @ _id id
  26             @ callback
  27     m getItemByPath
  28         string path
  29         callback
  30         _ this.getItem
  31             {
  32                 @ path path
  33             @ callback
  34     m getItemByNameAndParent
  35         string basename
  36         { parentId
  37             optional
  38         callback
  39         _ this.getItem
  40             {
  41                 @ basename basename
  42                 @ parentId parentId
  43             @ callback
  44     m getItemChildren
  45         { parentId
  46         callback
  47         # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.getItemChildren.enter', parentId
  48         _ this.items.find
  49             {
  50                 @ parentId parentId
  51             ._ toArray
  52                 f_cb( r )
  53                     # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.getItemChildren.r', parentId, r
  54                     r_cb( r )

.wizzi/ittf/lib/json/fs/t/fsjson/insertItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb
  • r_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     m insertItem
   3         { fsItem
   4             string basename
   5             number kind
   6         callback
   7         # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.insertItem. fsItem:', fsItem
   8         var basename = fsItem.basename
   9         var dirname = fsItem.dirname
  10         var parentId = fsItem.parentId
  11         set fsItem.path = dirname ? normalize(path.join(dirname, basename)) : basename
  12         const that = this
  13         _ this.getItemByNameAndParent
  14             @ basename
  15             @ parentId
  16             f_cb( item )
  17                 if item == null
  18                     # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.insertItem. Item does not exists. So insertOne'
  19                     _ that.items.insertOne
  20                         @ fsItem
  21                         f_cb( r )
  22                             # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.insertItem.insertOne', r
  23                             _ assert.equal(1, r.insertedCount)
  24                             _ assert.equal(1, r.ops.length)
  25                             r_cb()
  26                                 {
  27                                     @ code 'FSITEM_INSERTED'
  28                                     @ insertedId r.insertedId
  29                                     @ insertedCount r.insertedCount
  30                                     @ item r.ops[0]
  31                 else
  32                     # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.insertItem. Item exists. So return it'
  33                     r_cb()
  34                         {
  35                             @ code 'FSITEM_EXISTS'
  36                             @ item item

.wizzi/ittf/lib/json/fs/t/fsjson/read.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb
  • r_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     m readDocument
   3         { id
   4         callback
   5         _ this.documents.find
   6             {
   7                 @ _id id
   8             ._ toArray
   9                 f_cb( r )
  10                     # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.read.r', id, r
  11                     if r.length == 1
  12                         r_cb( r[0].content )
  13                     else
  14                         r_cb( null )

.wizzi/ittf/lib/json/fs/t/fsjson/updateItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb
  • r_cb_wz_err
  • r_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     m updateItem
   3         { fsitem
   4             { _id
   5         callback
   6         var upd_item
   7             _ Object.assign
   8                 {
   9                 @ fsitem
  10         set upd_item.path = fsitem.dirname ? normalize(path.join(fsitem.dirname, fsitem.basename)) : fsitem.basename
  11         _ this.items.replaceOne
  12             {
  13                 @ _id upd_item._id
  14             @ upd_item
  15             f_cb( r_upd )
  16                 # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.updateItem', r_upd.result
  17                 if r_upd.modifiedCount == 1
  18                     r_cb()
  19                         {
  20                             @ code 'FSITEM_UPDATED'
  21                             @ updatedCount r_upd.modifiedCount
  22                             @ item r_upd.ops[0]
  23                 else
  24                     r_cb_wz_err( JsonRepoError,  updateItem )
  25                         @ util.inspect( r_upd.result )
  26     m updateItemLastModified
  27         { id
  28         param lastModified
  29         callback
  30         var that = this
  31         _ this.getItemById
  32             @ id
  33             f_cb( r )
  34                 if r != null
  35                     set r.lastModified = lastModified
  36                     _ that.items.replaceOne
  37                         {
  38                             @ _id id
  39                         @ r
  40                         f_cb( r_upd )
  41                             # log 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson.updateItemLastModified', r_upd.result
  42                             if r_upd.modifiedCount == 1

  44                                     {
  45                                         @ code 'FSITEM_LASTMODIFIED_UPDATED'
  46                                         @ updatedCount r_upd.modifiedCount
  47                                         @ item r_upd.ops[0]
  48                             else
  49                                 r_cb_wz_err( JsonRepoError,  updateItemLastModified )
  50                                     @ util.inspect( r_upd.result )
  51                 else
  52                     r_cb_wz_err( JsonRepoError,  updateItemLastModified )

   1 module wizzi-repo.fs.json.DocumentManager
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import path
   4     import assert
   5     import async
   6     var vfile = require('wizzi-utils').vfile
   7     var verify = require('wizzi-utils').verify
   8     var jsonUriParser = require('wizzi-utils').uriParser
   9     var errors = require('../../errors')
  10     var FsStream = require('../../utils/fsstream')
  11     var Promise = require('promise')
  12     var JSZip = require('jszip')
  13     var FsJson = null
  14     #
  15         # class DocumentManager (Manager)
  16         # implements standard file operations (wizzi-utils/vfile interface) on a json\FsJson instance
  17         #
  18         # ctor params
  19         # fsCommon
  20         # # instance of json/FsJson
  21     class DocumentManager
  22         ctor
  23             param fsCommon
  24             _ assert( true, fsCommon.classType === 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson' );
  25             _ assert( true, !!fsCommon.items &&
  26                 \b fsCommon.items.classType === 'wizzi-repo.utils.Collection');
  27             _ assert( true, !!fsCommon.documents &&
  28                 \b fsCommon.documents.classType === 'wizzi-repo.utils.Collection');
  29             set this.classType = 'wizzi-repo.json.DocumentManager'
  30             +
  31             set this.fsCommon = fsCommon
  32             +
  33         fscommon/document/createFolder( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  34         fscommon/document/getFolder( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  35         fscommon/document/getDir( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  36         fscommon/document/getFiles( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  37         fscommon/document/getContent( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  38         fscommon/document/exists( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  39         fscommon/document/isFolder( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  40         fscommon/document/isFile( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  41         fscommon/document/copyFile( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  42         fscommon/document/copyFolder( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  43         fscommon/document/deleteFile( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  44         fscommon/document/deleteFolder( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  45         fscommon/document/renameFile( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  46         fscommon/document/renameFolder( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  47         fscommon/document/upload( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  48         fscommon/document/download( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  49         fscommon/document/writeFile( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  50         fscommon/document/createWriteStream( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  51         fscommon/document/readFile( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  52         fscommon/document/stat( fs.json,  JsonFS )
  53         m toJson
  54             param callback
  55             return
  56                 _ this.fsCommon.toJson
  57                     @ callback
  58         m close
  59             if this.fsCommon
  60                 _ this.fsCommon.close
  61                 set this.fsCommon = null
  62     #
  63         # Creates a DocumentManager instance
  64     set DocumentManager.create
  65         function
  66             param fsJsonData
  67             param callback
  68             +
  69             if verify.isUndefined(callback) && verify.isFunction(fsJsonData)
  70                 set callback = fsJsonData
  71                 set fsJsonData = null
  72             +
  73             if FsJson == null
  74                 set FsJson = require('./fsjson')
  75             return
  76                 _ callback
  77                     @ null
  78                     new DocumentManager
  79                         new FsJson(fsJsonData)
  80     function errorMsg
  81         param method
  82         param message
  83         return
  84             {
  85                 @ __is_error true
  86                 @ method 'Json.Fs.DocumentManager.' + method
  87                 @ message message
  88     function normalize
  89         param path
  90         param stripEndingSlash
  91         if stripEndingSlash
  92             var ret = path.trim().replace(/\\/g,'/').toLowerCase()
  93             var parsedUri
  94                 _ jsonUriParser
  95                     @ ret.substr(-1) === '/' ? ret.substr(0, ret.length-1) : ret
  96             return parsedUri.internalPath
  97         else
  98             var parsedUri
  99                 _ jsonUriParser
 100                     @ path.trim().replace(/\\/g,'/').toLowerCase()
 101             return parsedUri.internalPath
 102     function denormalize
 103         param path
 104         return path.trim().replace(/\//g,'\\').toLowerCase()
 105     set module.exports = DocumentManager

   1 module wizzi-repo.json.FsJson
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import assert
   4     import path
   5     import util
   6     var verify = require('wizzi-utils').verify
   7     var Collection = require('../../utils/collection')
   8     #
   9         # class FsJson
  10         # implements an in-memory json Filesystem (a set of documents organized in a tree of folders)
  11         #
  12         # Filesystem item
  13         # { fsitem
  14         # ObjectId _id
  15         # string basename
  16         # ObjectId parentId
  17         # string dirname
  18         # string path
  19         # integer kind
  20         # one-of 0 (directory), 1 (file)
  21         #
  22         # Document
  23         # { document
  24         # ObjectId _id
  25         # string content
  26         # ISODate lastModified
  27         #
  28         # ctor params
  29         # { fsJsonData
  30         # [ items
  31         # [ documents
  32     class FsJson
  33         ctor
  34             param fsJsonData
  35             set this.classType = 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson'
  36             if verify.isObject(fsJsonData)
  37                 if verify.isArray(fsJsonData.items) === false
  38                     throw
  39                         new Error
  40                             _ error
  41                                 @ 'InvalidArgument'
  42                                 @ 'ctor'
  43                                 {
  44                                     @ parameter 'fsJsonData.items'
  45                                     @ message 'The fsJsonData.items parameter must be an array. Received: ' + fsJsonData.items
  46                 if verify.isArray(fsJsonData.documents) === false
  47                     throw
  48                         new Error
  49                             _ error
  50                                 @ 'InvalidArgument'
  51                                 @ 'ctor'
  52                                 {
  53                                     @ parameter 'fsJsonData.documents'
  54                                     @ message 'The fsJsonData.documents parameter must be an array. Received: ' + fsJsonData.documents
  55                 set this.items = new Collection(fsJsonData.items)
  56                 set this.documents = new Collection(fsJsonData.documents)
  57             else
  58                 set this.items = new Collection([])
  59                 set this.documents = new Collection([])
  60         $include fsjson/getItem
  61         $include fsjson/insertItem
  62         $include fsjson/updateItem
  63         $include fsjson/deleteItem
  64         $include fsjson/read
  65         $include fsjson/write
  66         m toJson
  67             callback
  68             var that = this
  69             _ that.items.toArray
  70                 f_cb( items )
  71                     _ that.documents.toArray
  72                         f_cb( documents )
  73                             _ callback
  74                                 @ null
  75                                 {
  76                                     @ items items
  77                                     @ documents documents
  78         m toFiles
  79             { options
  80                 string removeRoot
  81                     optional
  82             callback
  83             _ this.items.toArray
  84                 a_cb( items )
  85                     _ this.documents.toArray
  86                         a_cb( documents )
  87                             var ret = []
  88                             foreach d in documents
  89                                 foreach item in items
  90                                     if item._id === d._id
  91                                         _ ret.push
  92                                             {
  93                                                 @ fullPath item.path
  94                                                 @ relPath options.removeRoot ? item.path.substr(options.removeRoot.length) : ''
  95                                                 @ content d.content
  96                             _ callback
  97                                 @ null
  98                                 @ ret
  99         m close
 100             # nothing to do
 101     #
 102         # Creates a FsJson instance
 103         # params
 104         # { fsJsonData
 105         # [ items
 106         # [ documents
 107         # callback
 108     set FsJson.create
 109         function
 110             param fsJsonData
 111             param callback
 112             +
 113             if verify.isUndefined(callback)
 114                 set callback = fsJsonData
 115                 set fsJsonData = null
 116             +
 117             if fsJsonData == null
 118                 set fsJsonData
 119                     {
 120                         @ items []
 121                         @ documents []
 122             else
 123                 if verify.isObject(fsJsonData) == false
 124                     return
 125                         _ callback
 126                             _ errorMsg('create', 'parameter fsJsonData must be an object')
 127                 if verify.isArray(fsJsonData.items) == false
 128                     return
 129                         _ callback
 130                             _ errorMsg('create', 'parameter fsJsonData must contain an items property')
 131                 if verify.isArray(fsJsonData.documents) == false
 132                     return
 133                         _ callback
 134                             _ errorMsg('create', 'parameter fsJsonData must contain a documents property')
 135             +
 136             return
 137                 _ callback
 138                     @ null
 139                     new FsJson(fsJsonData)
 140     function errorMsg
 141         param method
 142         param message
 143         return
 144             {
 145                 @ __is_error true
 146                 @ method 'Json.JsonDb.' + method
 147                 @ message message
 148     function normalize
 149         param path
 150         return path.trim().replace(/\\/g,'/').toLowerCase()
 151     set module.exports = FsJson

  10         # log 'wizzi-repo.json.jsonFsimpl.${name}.documentUri', documentUri
  11         $if arg1 === 'options' || arg2 === 'options'
  12             if typeof(callback) === 'undefined' && verify.isFunction(options)
  13                 set callback = options
  14                 set options = {}

  16             throw
  17                 new Error
  18                     _ error
  19                         @ 'InvalidArgument'

.wizzi/ittf/lib/json/directoryTree.js.ittf

                                

   1 module
   2     kind es6
   3     # forked from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mihneadb/node-directory-tree/master/lib/directory-tree.js
   4     const FS = require('fs')
   5     const PATH = require('path')
   6     const constants
   7         {
   8             @ DIRECTORY 1
   9             @ FILE 2
  10     function safeReadDirSync
  11         param path
  12         let dirData = {}
  13         try
  14             set dirData = FS.readdirSync(path)
  15         catch ex
  16             if ex.code == "EACCES"
  17                 # User does not have permissions, ignore directory
  18                 return null
  19             else
  20                 throw ex
  21         return dirData
  22     function normalizePath
  23         param path
  24         return path.replace(/\\/g, '/')
  25     function isRegExp
  26         param regExp
  27         return typeof regExp === "object" && regExp.constructor == RegExp
  28     function directoryTree
  29         param path
  30         const name = PATH.basename(path);
  31         set path = normalizePath(path)
  32         const item
  33             {
  34                 @ path
  35                 @ name
  36         let stats
  37         try
  38             set stats = FS.statSync(path)
  39         catch e
  40             return null
  41         # log 'stats', stats
  42         if stats.isFile()
  43             const ext = PATH.extname(path).toLowerCase();
  44             # Skip if it does not match the extension regex
  45             # log 'ext', ext
  46             if ext != '.ittf'
  47                 return null
  48             # File size in bytes
  49             # set item.size = stats.size
  50             # set item.extension = ext
  51             set item.type = constants.FILE
  52         elif stats.isDirectory()
  53             let dirData = safeReadDirSync(path)
  54             if dirData === null
  55                 return null
  56             set item.children = []
  57             set item.type = constants.DIRECTORY
  58             foreach child in dirData
  59                 _ item.children.push
  60                     _ directoryTree
  61                         _ PATH.join
  62                             @ path
  63                             @ child
  64         else
  65             return null
  66         return item
  67     set module.exports = directoryTree

   1 module
   2     kind es6
   3     var async = require('async')
   4     var md = {}
   5     set module.exports = md
   6     var Collection = require('../utils/collection')
   7     set md.directoryTree = require('./directoryTree')
   8     set md.FsJson = require('./fs/fsjson')
   9     set md.DocumentManager = require('./fs/documentmanager')
  10     #
  11         # params
  12         # { jsonFsData
  13         # [ items
  14         # [ documents
  15         # jsonFsData is simply a transport (DTO)
  16         # to get the updated jsonFsData you
  17         # must call the toJson method of the DocumentManager instance
  18     set md.createDocumentManager
  19         function
  20             param fsJsonDataOrFsJson
  21             if fsJsonDataOrFsJson && fsJsonDataOrFsJson.classType === 'wizzi-repo.json.FsJson'
  22                 return new md.DocumentManager(fsJsonDataOrFsJson)
  23             else
  24                 var jsonFsData = fsJsonDataOrFsJson || {}
  25                 set jsonFsData.items = jsonFsData.items || []
  26                 set jsonFsData.documents = jsonFsData.documents || []
  27                 return
  28                     new md.DocumentManager
  29                         new md.FsJson(jsonFsData)
  30     set md.createFsJson
  31         function

  33             param callback

  41             param jsonFsData

  60                     _ doc.toJson

   1 module wizzi-repo.json.jsonFsimpl
   2     kind jsfile
   3     var
   4         decl FsJson = require('./fs/fsjson')
   5         decl DocumentManager = require('./fs/documentmanager')
   6         decl jsonUriParser = require('wizzi-utils').uriParser
   7     #
   8         # class JsonFsImpl
   9         #
  10         # Implements the `fsimpl` interface for a json backed file system.
  11         # It is used by repo/jsonDbStore that implements the json repo store.
  12         # uses a json/DocumentManager instance to manage an in-memory json filesystem (json/fs/FsJson)
  13         # ctor params
  14         # { fsJsonData
  15         # [ items
  16         # # simple javascript array
  17         # [ documents
  18         # # simple javascript array
  19     class JsonFsImpl
  20         ctor
  21             param fsJsonData
  22             set this.classType = 'wizzi-repo.json.JsonFsImpl'
  23             set this.fsJsonData = fsJsonData
  24             set this.fsJson = null
  25             set this.docManager = null
  26         m db
  27             callback
  28             if this.docManager == null
  29                 r_cb_wz_err( InvalidOperation,  db )
  30                     @ 'Connection not opened. The method `open` must be called before calling `db`.'
  31             else
  32                 return
  33                     _ callback
  34                         @ null
  35                         @ this.docManager
  36         m open
  37             options-callback
  38             var that = this
  39             if this.docManager
  40                 return
  41                     _ callback
  42                         @ null
  43                         @ this.docManager
  44             set this.fsJson
  45                 iif options.fsJson
  46                     then options.fsJson
  47                     else
  48                         iif options.fsJsonData
  49                             then
  50                                 new FsJson(options.fsJsonData)
  51                             else
  52                                 new FsJson(this.fsJsonData)
  53             set that.docManager = new DocumentManager(this.fsJson)
  54             # log '***** json connected'
  55             return
  56                 _ callback
  57                     @ null
  58                     @ that.docManager
  59         m close
  60             if this.docManager
  61                 # log '***** json start closing'
  62                 set this.docManager = null
  63                 # log '***** json closed'
  64         jsonFsimpl/m( stat )
  65             _ jsonDb.stat
  66                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  67                 f_cb( result )
  68                     _ callback(null, result)
  69         jsonFsimpl/m( lstat )
  70             _ jsonDb.stat
  71                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  72                 f_cb( result )
  73                     _ callback(null, result)
  74         jsonFsimpl/m( readFile,  options )
  75             _ jsonDb.readFile
  76                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  77                 f_cb( result )
  78                     _ callback(null, result)
  79         jsonFsimpl/m( writeFile,  content,  options )
  80             _ jsonDb.writeFile
  81                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  82                 @ content
  83                 f_cb( result )
  84                     _ callback(null, result)
  85         jsonFsimpl/m( readdir,  options )
  86             _ jsonDb.getDir
  87                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  88                 @ options
  89                 f_cb( result )
  90                     var dir = []
  91                     foreach item in result
  92                         # log 'wizzi-repo.json.jsonFsimpl.readdir.parsedUri.internalPath, item', parsedUri.internalPath, item
  93                         _ dir.push(item.basename)
  94                     _ callback(null, dir)
  95         jsonFsimpl/m( mkdir,  options )
  96             _ jsonDb.createFolder
  97                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  98                 f_cb( result )
  99                     _ callback(null, result)
 100         jsonFsimpl/m( unlink )
 101             _ jsonDb.deleteFile
 102                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
 103                 f_cb( result )
 104                     _ callback(null, result)
 105         m createWriteStream
 106             string documentUri
 107             checked_call_return( parsedUri )
 108                 _ jsonUriParser
 109                     @ documentUri
 110                     @ this.jsonBaseFolder
 111             return
 112                 _ this.docManager.createWriteStream
 113                     @ parsedUri.internalPath
 114         m toJson
 115             param callback
 116             _ this.fsJson.toJson
 117                 f_cb_test( json )
 118                     return
 119                         _ callback(null, json)
 120     set module.exports = JsonFsImpl

.wizzi/ittf/lib/mongodb/fs/t/fsmongo/deleteItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb
  • r_cb
  • r_cb_wz_err 
                                

   1 $group
   2     m deleteItem
   3         { id
   4         callback
   5         var that = this
   6         _ this.getItemById
   7             @ id
   8             f_cb( fsitem )
   9                 if fsitem == null
  10                     r_cb_wz_err( MongoRepoError,  deleteItem )
  11                         @ 'FsMongo item not found: ' + id
  12                 _ that._deleteDocument
  13                     @ id
  14                     f_cb( r )
  15                         _ that.db.collection(FSITEMS).deleteOne
  16                             {
  17                                 @ _id id
  18                             f_cb( r )
  19                                 delete r.connection
  20                                 delete r.message
  21                                 # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo.deleteItem,r', r
  22                                 if r.deletedCount == 1 && r.result.ok == 1
  23                                     r_cb()
  24                                         {
  25                                             @ code 'FSITEM_DELETED'
  26                                             @ deletedCount r.deletedCount
  27                                 else
  28                                     r_cb_wz_err( MongoRepoError,  deleteItem )
  29                                         @ 'FsMongo error deleting item. Result: ' + util.inspect( r.result )
  30     m _deleteDocument
  31         param id
  32         param callback
  33         _ this.db.collection(DOCUMENTS).deleteOne
  34             {
  35                 @ _id id
  36             f_cb( r )
  37                 delete r.connection
  38                 delete r.message
  39                 # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo._deleteDocument.r', r
  40                 if r.deletedCount == 1 && r.result.ok == 1
  41                     # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo._deleteDocument', true
  42                     r_cb( true)
  43                 else
  44                     # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo._deleteDocument', false
  45                     r_cb( false)

   1 $group
   2     m insertItem
   3         { fsItem
   4             string basename
   5             number kind
   6         callback
   7         # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo.insertItem.fsItem', fsItem
   8         var basename = fsItem.basename
   9         var dirname = fsItem.dirname
  10         var parentId = fsItem.parentId
  11         set fsItem.path = dirname ? normalize(path.join(dirname, basename)) : basename
  12         const that = this
  13         _ this.getItemByNameAndParent
  14             @ basename
  15             @ parentId
  16             f_cb( item )
  17                 if item == null
  18                     _ that.db.collection(FSITEMS).insertOne
  19                         @ fsItem
  20                         f_cb( r )
  21                             delete r.connection
  22                             delete r.message
  23                             # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo.insertItem.insertOne.r', r
  24                             _ assert.equal(1, r.insertedCount)
  25                             _ assert.equal(1, r.ops.length)
  26                             r_cb()
  27                                 {
  28                                     @ code 'FSITEM_INSERTED'
  29                                     @ insertedId r.insertedId
  30                                     @ insertedCount r.insertedCount
  31                                     @ item r.ops[0]
  32                 else
  33                     r_cb()
  34                         {
  35                             @ code 'FSITEM_EXISTS'
  36                             @ item item

   1 $group
   2     m updateItem
   3         { fsitem

   5             number kind
   6         callback

   8             {
   9                 @ _id fsitem._id
  10             @ fsitem
  11             f_cb( r_upd )

  13                 delete r_upd.message

  16                     r_cb()
  17                         {
  18                             @ code 'FSITEM_UPDATED'
  19                             @ updatedCount r_upd.result.nModified

  22                     r_cb_wz_err( MongoRepoError,  updateItem )

  33                 if r != null

  35                     _ that.db.collection(FSITEMS).replaceOne
  36                         {
  37                             @ _id id
  38                         @ r

  40                             delete r_upd.connection

  45                                     {
  46                                         @ code 'FSITEM_LASTMODIFIED_UPDATED'

  52                 else
  53                     r_cb_wz_err( MongoRepoError,  updateItemLastModified )

   9             @ id

  14                     if f === content
  15                         # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo.writeDocument not modified', f

   5     import async

   9     var FsStream = require('../../utils/fsstream')
  10     var Promise = require('promise')
  11     var JSZip = require('jszip')
  12     var MongoClient = null
  13     var FsMongo = null
  14     class Document
  15         ctor
  16             param fsCommon
  17             set this.fsCommon = fsCommon
  18         fscommon/document/upload()
  19         fscommon/document/createFolder()
  20         fscommon/document/getFolder()
  21         fscommon/document/getDir()
  22         fscommon/document/getFiles()
  23         fscommon/document/getContent()

  26         fscommon/document/isFile()
  27         fscommon/document/copyFile()
  28         fscommon/document/copyFolder()
  29         fscommon/document/deleteFile()
  30         fscommon/document/deleteFolder()
  31         fscommon/document/renameFile()
  32         fscommon/document/renameFolder()
  33         fscommon/document/upload()
  34         fscommon/document/download()
  35         fscommon/document/writeFile()
  36         fscommon/document/createWriteStream()
  37         fscommon/document/readFile()
  38         fscommon/document/stat()
  39         m close
  40             if this.fsCommon
  41                 _ this.fsCommon.close
  42                 set this.fsCommon = null
  43     #
  44         # Creates a Document instance
  45     set Document.create
  46         function
  47             param mongoUri
  48             param callback
  49             +
  50             if verify.isUndefined(callback) && verify.isFunction(mongoUri)
  51                 set callback = mongoUri
  52                 set mongoUri = null
  53             +
  54             if MongoClient == null
  55                 set MongoClient = require('mongodb').MongoClient
  56                 set FsMongo = require('./fsmongo')
  57             set mongoUri = mongoUri || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test'
  58             _ MongoClient.connect
  59                 @ mongoUri
  60                 f_cb( mongoDb )
  61                     return
  62                         _ callback
  63                             @ null
  64                             new Document
  65                                 new FsMongo(mongoDb)
  66     function error
  67         param method
  68         param message
  69         return
  70             {
  71                 @ __is_error true
  72                 @ method 'Mongo.Document.' + method
  73                 @ message message
  74     function normalize
  75         param path
  76         return path.trim().replace(/\\/g,'/').toLowerCase()
  77     function denormalize
  78         param path
  79         return path.trim().replace(/\//g,'\\').toLowerCase()
  80     set module.exports = Document

   1 module wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import assert
   4     import path
   5     import util
   6     var verify = require('wizzi-utils').verify
   7     var MongoClient = null
   8     var FSITEMS = 'fsitems'
   9     var DOCUMENTS = 'documents'
  10     #
  11         # class FsMongo (Filesystem Db)
  12         #
  13         # Filesystem item
  14         # { fsitem
  15         # ObjectId _id
  16         # string basename
  17         # ObjectId parentId
  18         # string dirname
  19         # string path
  20         # integer kind
  21         # one-of 0 (directory), 1 (file)
  22         #
  23         # Document
  24         # { document
  25         # ObjectId _id
  26         # string content
  27         # ISODate lastModified
  28     class FsMongo
  29         ctor
  30             param db
  31             set this.db = db
  32         $include fsmongo/getItem
  33         $include fsmongo/insertItem
  34         $include fsmongo/updateItem
  35         $include fsmongo/deleteItem
  36         $include fsmongo/read
  37         $include fsmongo/write
  38         m close
  39             if this.db
  40                 # log '***** wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo start closing'
  41                 _ this.db.close
  42                 set this.db = null
  43                 # log '***** wizzi-repo.mongodb.FsMongo closed'
  44     #
  45         # Creates a FsMongo instance
  46     set FsMongo.create
  47         function
  48             param mongoUri
  49             param callback
  50             +
  51             if verify.isUndefined(callback) && verify.isFunction(mongoUri)
  52                 set callback = mongoUri
  53                 set mongoUri = null
  54             +
  55             if MongoClient == null
  56                 set MongoClient = require('mongodb').MongoClient
  57             set mongoUri = mongoUri || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test'
  58             _ MongoClient.connect
  59                 @ mongoUri
  60                 f_cb( mongoDb )
  61                     return
  62                         _ callback
  63                             @ null
  64                             new FsMongo(mongoDb)
  65     function error
  66         param method
  67         param message
  68         return
  69             {
  70                 @ __is_error true
  71                 @ method 'Mongo.FsMongo.' + method
  72                 @ message message
  73     function normalize
  74         param path
  75         return path.trim().replace(/\\/g,'/').toLowerCase()
  76     set module.exports = FsMongo

   7         $if arg2 != null

  16             throw
  17                 new Error

   1 module wizzi-repo.mongodb.mongoFsImpl
   2     kind jsfile
   3     #
   4         # Implements the `fsimpl` interface for a mongodb backed file system.
   5     var
   6         decl MongoClient
   7             _ require('mongodb')
   8                 . MongoClient
   9         decl FsMongo = require('./fs/fsmongo')
  10         decl Document = require('./fs/document')
  11         decl mongoUriParser = require('./mongoUriParser')
  12     class MongoFsImpl
  13         ctor
  14             param mongoUri
  15             string mongoBaseFolder
  16             set this.mongoUri = mongoUri || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test'
  17             set this.mongoBaseFolder = mongoBaseFolder
  18             set this.mongoDb = null
  19             set this.connecting = false
  20             set this.classType = 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.MongoFsImpl'
  21         m db
  22             callback
  23             if this.mongoDb == null
  24                 r_cb_wz_err( InvalidOperation,  db )
  25                     @ 'Connection not opened. The method `open` must be called before calling `db`.'
  26             else
  27                 return
  28                     _ callback
  29                         @ null
  30                         @ this.mongoDb
  31         m open
  32             callback
  33             var that = this
  34             if this.mongoDb
  35                 return
  36                     _ callback
  37                         @ null
  38                         @ this.mongoDb
  39             _ MongoClient.connect
  40                 @ this.mongoUri
  41                 f_cb( db )
  42                     set that.mounted_db = db
  43                     var fsmongo = new FsMongo(db)
  44                     set that.mongoDb = new Document(fsmongo)
  45                     # log '***** mongodb connected'
  46                     return
  47                         _ callback
  48                             @ null
  49                             @ that.mongoDb
  50         m close
  51             if this.mounted_db
  52                 # log '***** mongodb start closing'
  53                 _ this.mounted_db.close
  54                 set this.mounted_db = null
  55                 set this.mongoDb = null
  56                 # log '***** mongodb closed'
  57         mongoFsimpl/m( stat )
  58             _ mongoDb.stat
  59                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  60                 f_cb( result )
  61                     _ callback(null, result)
  62         mongoFsimpl/m( lstat )
  63             _ mongoDb.stat
  64                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  65                 f_cb( result )
  66                     _ callback(null, result)
  67         mongoFsimpl/m( readFile,  options )
  68             _ mongoDb.readFile
  69                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  70                 f_cb( result )
  71                     _ callback(null, result)
  72         mongoFsimpl/m( writeFile,  content,  options )
  73             _ mongoDb.writeFile
  74                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  75                 @ content
  76                 f_cb( result )
  77                     _ callback(null, result)
  78         mongoFsimpl/m( readdir,  options )
  79             _ mongoDb.getDir
  80                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  81                 @ options
  82                 f_cb( result )
  83                     var dir = []
  84                     foreach item in result

  87                     _ callback(null, dir)
  88         mongoFsimpl/m( mkdir,  options )
  89             _ mongoDb.createFolder
  90                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  91                 f_cb( result )
  92                     _ callback(null, result)
  93         mongoFsimpl/m( unlink )
  94             _ mongoDb.deleteFile
  95                 @ parsedUri.internalPath
  96                 f_cb( result )
  97                     _ callback(null, result)

  99             string documentUri
 100             checked_call_return( parsedUri )
 101                 _ mongoUriParser
 102                     @ documentUri
 103                     @ this.mongoBaseFolder
 104             return
 105                 _ this.mongoDb.createWriteStream

 107     set module.exports = MongoFsImpl

.wizzi/ittf/lib/mongodb/mongoUriParser.js.ittf

Fragments

  • r_wz_err 
                                

   1 module wizzi-repo.mongodb.mongoUriParser
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import path
   4     import url
   5     var verify = require('wizzi-utils').verify
   6     #
   7         # In a mongodb repo, documents are stored
   8         # per user and per project.
   9         # Document uris must be in the form
  10         # db://userName/projectName/documentPath
  11         # The internal db path will be
  12         # `config.mongoBaseFolder`/userName/projectName/documentPath
  13         # params
  14         # string uri
  15         # string mongoBaseFolder
  16         # returns
  17         # {
  18         # string originalUri
  19         # string userId
  20         # string projectId
  21         # string path
  22         # string storeKind
  23         # boolean isIttfDocument
  24         # string basename
  25         # string schema
  26         # string extension
  27     set module.exports
  28         function parse
  29             string uri
  30             string mongoBaseFolder
  31             set uri = uri.toLowerCase()
  32             var ret
  33                 {
  34                     @ originalUri uri
  35             var parsedUri = url.parse(uri)
  36             if typeof(parsedUri.protocol) !== 'string'
  37                 r_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  parse )
  38                     @ 'Uri must have a protocol (must be an absolute url). Received: ' + uri
  39             var protocol
  40                 iif parsedUri.protocol.substr(-1, 1) === ':'
  41                     then
  42                         _ parsedUri.protocol.substr(0, (parsedUri.protocol.length - 1))
  43                     else
  44                         set parsedUri.protocol
  45             if protocol !== 'db'
  46                 r_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  parse )
  47                     @ 'Invalid uri protocol. Must be `db`. Received: ' + uri
  48             # log 'parseuri.parsedUri', parsedUri
  49             var
  50                 decl name
  51                 decl parts = parsedUri.pathname ? parsedUri.pathname.split('/') : []
  52             if parsedUri.pathname && parsedUri.pathname.length > 0 && parsedUri.pathname[0] == '/'
  53                 _ parts.shift()
  54             set name = parts[parts.length-1]
  55             set ret.basename = name
  56             var nameparts = name.split('.')
  57             if nameparts.length > 2 && nameparts[nameparts.length -1] === 'ittf'
  58                 set ret.isIttfDocument = true
  59                 set ret.schema = nameparts[nameparts.length -2]
  60             else
  61                 set ret.isIttfDocument = false
  62                 set ret.extension = nameparts[nameparts.length -1]
  63             if parts.length < 1
  64                 r_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  parse )
  65                     {
  66                         @ parameter 'uri'
  67                         @ message 'A mongodb uri must be in the form `db://userName/projectName/documentPath`. Received: ' + uri
  68             # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.uriparser.parsedUri.parts', parts
  69             # log 'wizzi-repo.mongodb.uriparser.parsedUri', parsedUri
  70             set ret.storeKind = 'mongodb'
  71             set ret.userId = parsedUri.host
  72             set ret.projectId = parts[0]
  73             _ parts.shift();
  74             set ret.path = parts.join('/')
  75             if mongoBaseFolder && mongoBaseFolder.length > 0
  76                 set ret.internalPath
  77                     _ verify.unixifyPath
  78                         _ path.join
  79                             @ mongoBaseFolder
  80                             @ ret.userId
  81                             @ ret.projectId
  82                             @ ret.path
  83             # log 'parseuri.ret', ret
  84             return ret

   1 module wizzi-repo.browserFSStore
   2     kind jsfile
   3     $if isWebpackTarget
   4         import util
   5         var BrowserFS = require('browserfs')
   6         var verify = require('wizzi-utils').verify
   7         var vfile = require('wizzi-utils').vfile
   8         var errors = require('./errors')
   9         function isBrowserPath
  10             param method
  11             param documentPath
  12             param callback
  13             if verify.startsWith(documentPath, '/ixdb') ||
  14                 \b verify.startsWith(documentPath, '/tmp')
  15                 return true
  16             else
  17                 _ callback
  18                     _ error
  19                         @ '999'
  20                         @ method
  21                         {
  22                             @ parameter 'documentPath'
  23                             @ message 'Not a BrowserFS documentPath. Should be oneOf /tmp, /ixdb'
  24                 return false
  25         class BrowserFSStore
  26             ctor
  27                 set this.storeKind = 'browser'
  28                 set this.file = null
  29             m init
  30                 { options
  31                 callback
  32                 var that = this
  33                 _ vfile
  34                     f_cb( file)
  35                         set that.file = file
  36                         return
  37                             _ callback
  38                                 @ null
  39             m close
  40                 # TODO
  41             m documentExists
  42                 string documentPath
  43                 callback
  44                 if isBrowserPath('documentExists', documentPath, callback)
  45                     _ this.file.isFile
  46                         @ documentPath
  47                         f_cb_no_err( result )
  48                             if err
  49                                 r_cb_wz_err( RepoIOError,  documentExists,  err )
  50                                     {
  51                                         @ parameter 'documentPath'
  52                                         @ message 'Checking existence of document: ' + documentPath
  53                             return callback(null, result)
  54             m getModelContent
  55                 string documentPath
  56                 callback
  57                 if isBrowserPath('documentExists', documentPath, callback)
  58                     _ this.file.read
  59                         @ documentPath
  60                         f_cb_no_err( result )
  61                             if err
  62                                 r_cb_wz_err( RepoIOError,  getModelContent,  err )
  63                                     {
  64                                         @ parameter 'documentPath'
  65                                         @ message 'Getting content of document: ' + documentPath
  66                             # log 'getModelContent.received', result
  67                             return callback(null, result)
  68     $else
  69         class BrowserFSStore
  70             ctor
  71                 throw 'Not supported outside of browser'
  72     set module.exports = BrowserFSStore

.wizzi/ittf/lib/repo/fileSystemStore.js.ittf

Fragments

  • r_wz_err
  • r_cb_wz_err 
                                

   1 module wizzi-repo.fileSystemStore
   2     kind jsfile
   3     $if isWebpackTarget
   4         class FileSystemStore
   5     $else
   6         var file = require('wizzi-utils').file
   7         var errors = require('./errors')
   8         class FileSystemStore
   9             ctor
  10                 set this.storeKind = 'filesystem'
  11             m documentExists
  12                 string filepath
  13                 callback
  14                 var documentExists
  15                 try
  16                     set documentExists = file.isFile(filepath)
  17                 catch ex
  18                     r_cb_wz_err( RepoIOError,  documentExists,  ex )
  19                         @ 'Checking the existence of document: ' + filepath + '. Message: ' + ex.message
  20                 _ callback(null, documentExists)
  21             m folderExistsSync
  22                 string folderpath
  23                 var folderExists
  24                 try
  25                     set folderExists = file.isDirectory(folderpath)
  26                 catch ex
  27                     r_wz_err( RepoIOError,  folderExistsSync,  ex )
  28                         @ 'Checking the existence of folder: ' + folderpath + '. Message: ' + ex.message
  29                 return folderExists
  30             m getFoldersSync
  31                 string parentFolderPath
  32                 { options
  33                 var folders
  34                 try
  35                     set folders = file.getFolders(parentFolderPath, options)
  36                 catch ex
  37                     r_wz_err( RepoIOError,  getFoldersSync,  ex )
  38                         @ 'Getting folder: ' + parentFolderPath + '. Message: ' + ex.message
  39                 return folders
  40             m getModelContent
  41                 string filepath
  42                 callback
  43                 var content
  44                 try
  45                     set content = file.read(filepath)
  46                 catch ex
  47                     r_cb_wz_err( RepoIOError,  getModelContent,  ex )
  48                         @ 'Reading filepath: ' + filepath + '. Message: ' + ex.message
  49                 return callback(null, content)
  50     set module.exports = FileSystemStore

.wizzi/ittf/lib/repo/fragmentsFinder.js.ittf

                                

   1 module wizzi-repo.fragmentsFinder
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import path
   4     var verify = require('wizzi-utils').verify
   5     var config = require('../../config')
   6     var errors = require('./errors')
   7     var IttfDocumentStore = require('./ittfDocumentStore')
   8     class FragmentsFinder
   9         ctor
  10             { store
  11             string schema
  12             set this.store = store
  13             set this.schema = schema
  14             set this.ext = '.' + schema + '.ittf'
  15             set this.baseFolder = config.get('wfBaseFolder')
  16         m getFragmentsInScope
  17             string ittfDocumentUri
  18             var folderUri = path.dirname(ittfDocumentUri)
  19             var ret = []
  20             _ this._search_up(folderUri, ret)
  21             _ this._search_down(folderUri, ret)
  22             return ret;
  23         m _search_down
  24             string folderUri
  25             { resultByRef
  26                 [ folders
  27             var folders
  28                 _ this.store.getFoldersSync
  29                     @ folderUri
  30                     {
  31                         @ deep true
  32                         @ tFoldersOnly true
  33                         @ documentNames true
  34             foreach item in folders
  35                 _ resultByRef.folders.push(item)
  36         m _search_up
  37             string folderUri
  38             { resultByRef
  39                 [ folders
  40             set parentUri = path.dirname(folderUri)
  41             if !verify.startsWith(parentUri, this.baseFolder)
  42                 return
  43             var folders
  44                 _ this.store.getFoldersSync
  45                     @ parentUri
  46                     {
  47                         @ deep false
  48                         @ tFoldersOnly true
  49                         @ documentNames true
  50             foreach item in folders
  51                 _ resultByRef.folders.push(item)
  52         m createFileSystemFragmentFinder
  53             static
  54             string schema
  55             var store = IttfDocumentStore.createFileSystemDocumentStore()
  56             var ret = new FragmentsFinder(store, schema)
  57             return ret
  58     set module.exports = FragmentsFinder

   1 module wizzi-repo.ittfDocumentFinder
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import path
   4     class IttfDocumentFinder
   5         ctor
   6             { store
   7             string schema
   8             set this.store = store
   9             set this.schema = schema
  10         #
  11             # params
  12             # { options
  13             # string ittfDocumentUri
  14             # |
  15             # string basedir
  16             # string relpath
  17         m resolvePath
  18             { options
  19             callback
  20             var
  21                 decl ittfDocumentUri = options.ittfDocumentUri
  22                 decl relpath = options.relpath
  23             if verify.isNotEmpty(ittfDocumentUri) === false
  24                 var basedir = options.basedir
  25                 if verify.isNotEmpty (basedir) === false || verify.isAbsolutePath(basedir) === false
  26                     r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  resolvePath )
  27                         @ 'An "options.ittfDocumentUri" parameter or an "options.basedir" parameter with an absolute path is required to load an ITTF document. Received: ' +
  28                             \b 'ittfDocumentUri: ' + options.ittfDocumentUri +
  29                             \b ', basedir: ' + options.basedir +
  30                             \b ', relpath: ' + options.relpath
  31                 if (verify.isNotEmpty(relpath) === false) || (relpath[0] === '/')
  32                     r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  resolvePath )
  33                         @ 'An "options.ittfDocumentUri" parameter or an "options.relpath" parameter with a relative path is required to load an ITTF document. Received: ' +
  34                             \b 'ittfDocumentUri: ' + options.ittfDocumentUri +
  35                             \b ', basedir: ' + options.basedir +
  36                             \b ', relpath: ' + options.relpath
  37                 set ittfDocumentUri = path.join(basedir, relpath)
  38             var that = this
  39             _ this.tryExists
  40                 @ ittfDocumentUri
  41                 @ this.schema
  42                 f_cb( result )
  43                     if result.found
  44                         return
  45                             _ callback
  46                                 @ null
  47                                 @ result.ittfDocumentUri
  48                     else
  49                         if verify.isNotEmpty(relpath) === false
  50                             r_cb_wz_err( IttfNotFound,  resolvePath )
  51                                 {
  52                                     @ parameter ittfDocumentUri
  53                                     @ message 'Cannot resolve ittf document: ' + ittfDocumentUri
  54                         _ that.resolvePathInTFolders
  55                             _ path.dirname(ittfDocumentUri)
  56                             @ relpath
  57                             f_cb( tresult )
  58                                 if tresult.found
  59                                     return
  60                                         _ callback
  61                                             @ null
  62                                             @ tresult.ittfDocumentUri
  63                                 else
  64                                     # log 'IttfDocumentFinder.resolvePath options', options, that.schema
  65                                     r_cb_wz_err( IttfNotFound,  resolvePath )
  66                                         @ 'Cannot find ittf document: ' + ittfDocumentUri
  67         m resolvePathInTFolders
  68             string basePath
  69             string relPath
  70             callback
  71             var that = this
  72             $include ittfDocumentFinder/recurserTFolder
  73             _ recurserTFolder
  74                 @ basePath
  75                 @ relPath
  76                 ._ then
  77                     function
  78                         param result
  79                         return
  80                             _ callback(null, result)
  81         m tryExists
  82             string test
  83             param schema
  84             callback
  85             var that = this
  86             _ this.store.documentExists
  87                 @ test
  88                 f_cb( result )
  89                     if result
  90                         return
  91                             _ callback
  92                                 @ null
  93                                 {
  94                                     @ found true
  95                                     @ ittfDocumentUri test
  96                     else
  97                         if test.toLowerCase().substr(-5, 5) !== '.ittf'
  98                             if schema
  99                                 _ that.store.documentExists
 100                                     @ test + '.' + schema + '.ittf'
 101                                     f_cb( result )
 102                                         if result
 103                                             return
 104                                                 _ callback
 105                                                     @ null
 106                                                     {
 107                                                         @ found true
 108                                                         @ ittfDocumentUri test + '.' + schema + '.ittf'
 109                                         else
 110                                             _ that.store.documentExists
 111                                                 @ test + '.ittf'
 112                                                 f_cb( result )
 113                                                     if result
 114                                                         return
 115                                                             _ callback
 116                                                                 @ null
 117                                                                 {
 118                                                                     @ found true
 119                                                                     @ ittfDocumentUri test + '.ittf'
 120                                                     else
 121                                                         return
 122                                                             _ callback
 123                                                                 @ null
 124                                                                 {
 125                                                                     @ found false
 126                             else
 127                                 return
 128                                     _ callback
 129                                         @ null
 130                                         {
 131                                             @ found false
 132                         else
 133                             return
 134                                 _ callback
 135                                     @ null
 136                                     {
 137                                         @ found false
 138     set module.exports = IttfDocumentFinder

   1 module wizzi-repo.ittfDocumentStore
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import util
   4     var errors = require('./errors')
   5     # var uriParser = require('./uriParser')
   6     var uriParser = require('wizzi-utils').uriParser
   7     var FileSystemStore = require('./fileSystemStore')
   8     $if wzConfig_useMongo
   9         var MongoDbStore = require('./mongoDbStore')
  10     $else
  11         var MongoDbStore = {}
  12     $if isWebpackTarget
  13         var BrowserFSStore = require('./browserFSStore')
  14     $else
  15         var BrowserFSStore = {}
  16     var JsonDbStore = require('./jsonDbStore')
  17     #
  18         #
  19         #
  20     class IttfDocumentStore
  21         m parseUri
  22             string ittfDocumentUri
  23             callback
  24             _ uriParser
  25                 @ ittfDocumentUri
  26                 @ callback
  27         #
  28             # params
  29             # { storeInfo
  30             # string storeKind
  31             # oneOf filesystem, mongodb, json, browser
  32             # string storeUri
  33             # # when storeKind === 'mongodb'
  34             # string storeBaseFolder
  35             # # when storeKind === 'mongodb'
  36             # string storeJsonFsData
  37             # # when storeKind === 'json'
  38         m init
  39             { storeInfo
  40                 string storeKind
  41             callback
  42             if storeInfo.storeKind === 'filesystem'
  43                 $if isWebpackTarget
  44                     r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  init )
  45                         {
  46                             @ parameter 'storeKind'
  47                             @ message "Invalid storeKind when isWebpackTarget == true : " + storeInfo.storeKind
  48                 $else
  49                     set this.storeImpl = new FileSystemStore()
  50                     set this.storeKind = this.storeImpl.storeKind
  51                     return
  52                         _ callback(null)
  53             $if wzConfig_useMongo
  54                 elif storeInfo.storeKind === 'mongodb'
  55                     set this.storeImpl = new MongoDbStore()
  56                     var that = this
  57                     _ this.storeImpl.init
  58                         {
  59                             @ mongoUri storeInfo.storeUri
  60                             @ mongoBaseFolder storeInfo.storeBaseFolder
  61                         f_cb( notUsed )
  62                             set that.storeKind = that.storeImpl.storeKind
  63                             return
  64                                 _ callback(null)
  65             elif storeInfo.storeKind === 'json'
  66                 # log 'storeInfo', storeInfo
  67                 set this.storeImpl = new JsonDbStore()
  68                 var that = this
  69                 _ this.storeImpl.init
  70                     {
  71                         @ jsonFsData storeInfo.storeJsonFsData
  72                         @ fsJson storeInfo.storeFsJson
  73                     f_cb( notUsed )
  74                         set that.storeKind = that.storeImpl.storeKind
  75                         return
  76                             _ callback(null)
  77             $if isWebpackTarget
  78                 elif storeInfo.storeKind === 'browser'
  79                     set this.storeImpl = new BrowserFSStore()
  80                     var that = this
  81                     _ this.storeImpl.init
  82                         {
  83                         f_cb( notUsed )
  84                             set that.storeKind = that.storeImpl.storeKind
  85                             return
  86                                 _ callback(null)
  87             else
  88                 r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  init )
  89                     {
  90                         @ parameter 'storeKind'
  91                         @ message "Unknown storeKind: " + storeInfo.storeKind
  92         m initSync
  93             { storeInfo
  94                 string storeKind
  95             if storeInfo.storeKind === 'filesystem'
  96                 set this.storeImpl = new FileSystemStore()
  97             else
  98                 r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  initSync )
  99                     {
 100                         @ parameter 'storeInfo.storeKind'
 101                         @ message 'Method "initSync" is for storeKind "filesystem" only. ' +
 102                             \b 'Received: ' + storeInfo.storeKind
 103             set this.storeKind = this.storeImpl.storeKind
 104         m close
 105             if this.storeImpl && this.storeImpl.close
 106                 _ this.storeImpl.close
 107         m documentExists
 108             string documentUri
 109             callback
 110             _ this.storeImpl.documentExists(documentUri, callback)
 111         m getModelContent
 112             string documentUri
 113             callback
 114             _ this.storeImpl.getModelContent(documentUri, callback)
 115         m folderExistsSync
 116             string folderUri
 117             if this.storeKind !== 'filesystem'
 118                 r_cb_wz_err( InvalidRequest,  folderExistsSync )
 119                     @ 'Method "folderExistsSync" is for storeKind "filesystem" only. ' +
 120                         \b 'Current storeKind is: ' + this.storeKind
 121             return this.storeImpl.folderExists(folderUri)
 122         m getFoldersSync
 123             string parentFolderUri
 124             { options
 125             if this.storeKind !== 'filesystem'
 126                 r_cb_wz_err( InvalidRequest,  getFoldersSync )
 127                     @ 'Method "getFoldersSync" is for storeKind "filesystem" only. ' +
 128                         \b 'Current storeKind is: ' + this.storeKind
 129             return this.storeImpl.getFoldersSync(parentFolderUri, options)
 130         m createFileSystemDocumentStore
 131             static
 132             var ret = new IttfDocumentStore()
 133             _ ret.initSync
 134                 {
 135                     @ storeKind "filesystem"
 136             return ret
 137         m getInfo
 138             if this.storeImpl.getInfo
 139                 return this.storeImpl.getInfo()
 140             else
 141                 return
 142                     {
 143                         @ storeKind this.storeKind
 144     set module.exports = IttfDocumentStore
