.wizzi/ittf/lib/repo/uriParser.js.ittf

Fragments

  • r_cb_wz_err 
                                

   1 module wizzi-repo.uriParser
   2     kind jsfile
   3     throw new Error('wizzi-repo.uriParser has been replaced with wizzi-utils.uriParser')
   4     $if false
   5         #
   6             # params
   7             # string uri
   8             # returns
   9             # {
  10             # string originalUri
  11             # string protocol
  12             # one-of 'db', 'ls', drive letter
  13             # string storeKind
  14             # one-of 'mongodb', 'localstorage', 'filesystem'
  15             # string userId
  16             # # if storeKind === 'mongodb'
  17             # string projectId
  18             # # if storeKind === 'mongodb'
  19             # string path
  20             # boolean isIttfDocument
  21             # string basename
  22             # string schema
  23             # # if isIttfDocument === true
  24             # string extension
  25             # # if isIttfDocument === false
  26             #
  27         import url
  28         set module.exports
  29             function parse
  30                 string uri
  31                 callback
  32                 set uri = uri.toLowerCase()
  33                 var ret
  34                     {
  35                         @ originalUri uri
  36                 var parsedUri = url.parse(uri)
  37                 if typeof(parsedUri.protocol) !== 'string'
  38                     r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  parse )
  39                         @ 'Uri must have a protocol (must be an absolute url). Received: ' + uri
  40                 var protocol
  41                     iif parsedUri.protocol.substr(-1, 1) === ':'
  42                         then
  43                             _ parsedUri.protocol.substr(0, (parsedUri.protocol.length - 1))
  44                         else
  45                             set parsedUri.protocol
  46                 # log 'parseuri.parsedUri', parsedUri
  47                 set ret.protocol = protocol
  48                 if protocol === 'db'
  49                     set ret.storeKind = 'mongodb'
  50                 elif protocol === 'ls'
  51                     set ret.storeKind = 'localstorage'
  52                 else
  53                     if protocol.length === 1
  54                         set ret.storeKind = 'filesystem'
  55                     else
  56                         r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  parse )
  57                             @ 'Uri protocol must be `db` or `ls` or a filesystem drive letter. Received: ' + protocol
  58                 +
  59                 var name, parts = parsedUri.pathname ? parsedUri.pathname.split('/') : []
  60                 if parsedUri.pathname && parsedUri.pathname.length > 0 && parsedUri.pathname[0] == '/'
  61                     _ parts.shift()
  62                 set name = parts[parts.length-1]
  63                 set ret.basename = name
  64                 var nameparts = name.split('.')
  65                 if nameparts.length > 2 && nameparts[nameparts.length -1] === 'ittf'
  66                     set ret.isIttfDocument = true
  67                     set ret.schema = nameparts[nameparts.length -2]
  68                 else
  69                     set ret.isIttfDocument = false
  70                     set ret.extension = nameparts[nameparts.length -1]
  71                 if ret.storeKind === 'mongodb'
  72                     if parts.length < 1
  73                         r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  parse )
  74                             {
  75                                 @ parameter 'uri'
  76                                 @ message 'A mongodb uri must be in the form `db://userName/projectName/documentPath`. Received: ' + uri
  77                     # log 'wizzi-repo.fs.uriparser.parsedUri.parts', parts
  78                     # log 'wizzi-repo.fs.uriparser.parsedUri', parsedUri
  79                     set ret.userId = parsedUri.host
  80                     set ret.projectId = parts[0]
  81                     _ parts.shift();
  82                     set ret.path = parts.join('/')
  83                 else
  84                     set ret.path = parts.join('/')
  85                 # log 'parseuri.ret', ret
  86                 return
  87                     _ callback
  88                         @ null
  89                         @ ret

.wizzi/ittf/lib/repo/utils.js.ittf

                                

   1 module
   2     kind jsfile
   3     var md = module.exports = {}
   4     set md.getSrcPathInfo
   5         function
   6             param srcPath
   7             if typeof (srcPath) === 'string'
   8                 return srcPath
   9             if (srcPath && (typeof (srcPath) === 'object'))
  10                 var msg = md.getSrcPathInfoFromNode(srcPath)
  11                 return
  12                     iif msg
  13                         then msg
  14                         else
  15                             _ srcPath.toString()
  16             return 'unavailable'
  17     set md.getSrcPathInfoFromNode
  18         function
  19             param node
  20             var msg
  21                 [
  22             if node
  23                 if node.wzSourceLineInfo
  24                     var info = node.wzSourceLineInfo
  25                     var filePath = 'TODO'
  26                     if node.wzSourceFilepath
  27                         set filePath = node.wzSourceFilepath(info.sourceKey)
  28                     _ msg.push((' at row: ' + info.row))
  29                     _ msg.push((', col: ' + info.col))
  30                     _ msg.push((', source: ' + info.sourceKey))
  31                     _ msg.push((', in file: ' + filePath))
  32             return
  33                 iif msg.length == 0
  34                     then null
  35                     else
  36                         _ msg.join('')

.wizzi/ittf/lib/t/fscommon/document/copyFile.js.ittf

  • r_cb
  • r_cb_wz_err 
                                

   1 $group
   2     $params source|fs.mongodb, fsname|MongoFS
   3     m copyFile
   4         string sourcePath
   5         string destPath
   6         callback
   7         var sourcePath = normalize(sourcePath)
   8         var destPath = normalize(destPath)
   9         if sourcePath === destPath
  10             r_cb( {} )
  11         var that = this
  12         _ this.readFile
  13             @ sourcePath
  14             f_cb( source )
  15                 # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.copyFile.source', source
  16                 _ that.exists
  17                     @ destPath
  18                     f_cb( result )
  19                         if result === true
  20                             r_cb_wz_err( ${fsname}RepoError,  copyFile )
  21                                 @ 'Document copy file error. The destination path already exists: ' + destPath
  22                         else
  23                             _ that.writeFile
  24                                 @ destPath
  25                                 @ source
  26                                 f_cb( r )
  27                                     log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.copyFile.r', r
  28                                     r_cb()
  29                                         {
  30                                             @ code "DOCUMENT_COPIED"

   1 $group
   2     $params source|fs.mongodb, fsname|MongoFS
   3     m copyFolder
   4         string sourcePath
   5         string destPath
   6         callback
   7         set sourcePath = normalize(sourcePath)
   8         set destPath = normalize(destPath)
   9         if sourcePath === destPath
  10             log 'wizzi-repo.t.fscommon.document.copyFolder. sourcePath === destPath'
  11             r_cb( {} )
  12         var that = this
  13         var copies = []
  14         log 'wizzi-repo.t.fscommon.document.getFiles.before'
  15         _ this.getFiles
  16             @ sourcePath
  17             {
  18                 @ deep true
  19             f_cb( files )
  20                 log 'wizzi-repo.t.fscommon.document.copyFolder. files', files.length
  21                 var
  22                     decl sourcefile
  23                     decl destfile
  24                     decl files_len = files.length
  25                 function repeater
  26                     param index
  27                     if index === files_len
  28                         r_cb( copies )
  29                     set sourcefile = files[index]
  30                     set destfile = sourcefile.replace(sourcePath, destPath)
  31                     _ that.copyFile
  32                         @ sourcefile
  33                         @ destfile
  34                         f_cb( r )
  35                             _ copies.push(r)
  36                             _ process.nextTick
  37                                 function
  38                                     _ repeater(index + 1)
  39                 _ repeater(0)

.wizzi/ittf/lib/t/fscommon/document/createFolder.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     $params source|fs.mongodb, fsname|MongoFS
   3     m createFolder
   4         string folderPath
   5         callback
   6         set folderPath = normalize(folderPath)
   7         var parts = folderPath.split('/')
   8         var dirname = []
   9         var insertedId = null
  10         var parentFsItemId = null
  11         var lastInserted = null
  12         # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.createFolder.parts', parts
  13         var that = this
  14         var item, len = parts.length
  15         function repeater
  16             param index
  17             if index === len
  18                 return callback(null, lastInserted)
  19             set item = parts[index]
  20             if item.length == 0
  21                 return
  22                     _ process.nextTick
  23                         function
  24                             _ repeater(index + 1)
  25             var dirnameS = dirname.join('/')
  26             _ dirname.push(item)
  27             var pathS = dirname.join('/')
  28             # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.createFolder.item,dirnameS,pathS', item , dirnameS, pathS
  29             _ that.fsCommon.insertItem
  30                 {
  31                     @ basename item
  32                     @ parentId parentFsItemId
  33                     @ dirname dirnameS
  34                     @ path pathS
  35                     @ kind 0
  36                 f_cb( r )
  37                     # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.createFolder.r', r
  38                     set lastInserted = r
  39                     if r.code === 'FSITEM_EXISTS'
  40                         if r.kind == 1
  41                             throw Error('${fsname} createFolder error: ' + folderPath + ' is or contains a document path')
  42                         set insertedId = r.item._id
  43                     else
  44                         set insertedId = r.insertedId
  45                     set parentFsItemId = insertedId
  46                     _ process.nextTick
  47                         function
  48                             _ repeater(index + 1)
  49         _ repeater(0)

   3     m createWriteStream

   8                 @ filePath
   9                 @ this

   9         var extension = options.extension
  10         var documentContent = options.documentContent || false
  11         +
  12         var that = this
  13         function get_files_Async
  14             param singleFolderPath
  15             param callback
  16             # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.get_files_Async', singleFolderPath

  29                                         _ callback(err)
  30                                 else
  31                                     r_cb( r2)
  32                     else
  33                         r_cb( null )
  34         function recurser
  35             param folderPaths
  36             param files
  37             param ids
  38             param basenames
  39             return
  40                 new Promise
  41                     function
  42                         param resolve
  43                         param reject
  44                         _ async.map
  45                             @ folderPaths
  46                             @ get_files_Async
  47                             f_cb_no_err( fsitemsArray )
  48                                 # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.getfiles err, fsitemsArray', err, fsitemsArray
  49                                 if err
  50                                     return
  51                                         _ reject
  52                                             @ err
  53                                 var subfolders = []
  54                                 foreach fsitems in fsitemsArray
  55                                     if fsitems != null
  56                                         foreach item in fsitems
  57                                             if item.kind == 0
  58                                                 _ subfolders.push(item.path)
  59                                             else
  60                                                 if !extension || item.path.substr(-extension.length) === extension
  61                                                     _ files.push(item.path)
  62                                                     _ ids.push(item._id)
  63                                                     _ basenames.push(item.basename)
  64                                 if deep && subfolders.length > 0
  65                                     _ recurser
  66                                         @ subfolders
  67                                         @ files
  68                                         @ ids
  69                                         @ basenames
  70                                         ._ then
  71                                             function
  72                                                 _ resolve()
  73                                 else
  74                                     _ resolve()
  75         var files = []
  76         var ids = []
  77         var basenames = []

  79             @ [folderPath]
  80             @ files
  81             @ ids
  82             @ basenames
  83             ._ then
  84                 function
  85                     # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.getfiles', 'folderPath', folderPath, 'files', files, 'ids', ids, 'documentContent', documentContent
  86                     if !documentContent
  87                         return
  88                             _ callback(null, files)
  89                     else
  90                         _ that.getContentsByIds
  91                             @ ids
  92                             f_cb( contents )
  93                                 # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.getfiles.contents', contents
  94                                 var ret = []
  95                                 for var i=0; i<files.length; i++
  96                                     _ ret.push
  97                                         {
  98                                             @ basename basenames[i]
  99                                             @ path files[i]
 100                                             @ fullPath files[i]
 101                                             @ content contents[i]
 102                                 return
 103                                     _ callback(null, ret)
 104                 ._ catch
 105                     function
 106                         param err
 107                         return
 108                             _ callback(err)

   1 $group
   2     $params source|fs.mongodb, fsname|MongoFS
   3     m renameFile
   4         string oldPath
   5         string newPath
   6         callback
   7         set oldPath = normalize(path.resolve(oldPath))
   8         set newPath = normalize(path.resolve(newPath))
   9         if oldPath === newPath
  10             return
  11                 _ callback
  12                     @ null
  13                     {
  14         var oldDirname = normalize(path.dirname(oldPath))
  15         var newDirname = normalize(path.dirname(newPath))
  16         var oldName = path.basename(oldPath)
  17         var newName = path.basename(newPath)
  18         if oldDirname !== newDirname
  19             r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  renameFile )
  20                 @ 'Document rename file error. Old and new path must have the same base folder: ' + oldDirname + ' !== ' + newDirname
  21         if oldName === newName
  22             r_cb()
  23                 {
  24                     @ renamed false
  25                     @ message 'oldPath and newPath are the same'
  26         var that = this
  27         _ this.fsCommon.getItemByPath
  28             @ oldPath
  29             f_cb( fsitem )
  30                 if fsitem == null
  31                     r_cb_wz_err( ${fsname}RepoError,  renameFile )
  32                         @ 'Document rename file error. Old path not found: ' + oldPath
  33                 if fsitem.kind == 0
  34                     r_cb_wz_err( ${fsname}RepoError,  renameFile )
  35                         @ 'Document rename file error. Is a folder path, not a file path: ' + oldPath
  36                 # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFile.fsitem', fsitem
  37                 _ that.exists
  38                     @ newPath
  39                     f_cb( r )
  40                         if r === true
  41                             r_cb_wz_err( ${fsname}RepoError,  renameFile )
  42                                 @ 'Document rename file error. The new path already exists: ' + newPath
  43                         else
  44                             set fsitem.basename = newName
  45                             set fsitem.path = normalize(path.join(fsitem.dirname, fsitem.basename))

  48                                 f_cb( r )
  49                                     r_cb()
  50                                         {
  51                                             @ code "DOCUMENT_RENAMED"
  52                                             @ id r.item._id

  15         var newDirname = normalize(path.dirname(newPath))
  16         var oldName = path.basename(oldPath)
  17         var newName = path.basename(newPath)
  18         if oldDirname !== newDirname
  19             r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  renameFile )
  20                 @ 'Document rename folder error. Old and new path must have the same base folder: ' + oldDirname + ' !== ' + newDirname
  21         if oldName === newName
  22             r_cb()
  23                 {
  24                     @ renamed false
  25                     @ message 'oldPath and newPath are the same'
  26         var that = this
  27         _ this.fsCommon.getItemByPath
  28             @ oldPath
  29             f_cb( fsitem )
  30                 if fsitem == null
  31                     r_cb_wz_err( ${fsname}RepoError,  renameFolder )
  32                         @ 'Document rename folder error. Old path not found: ' + oldPath
  33                 if fsitem.kind == 1
  34                     r_cb_wz_err( ${fsname}RepoError,  renameFolder )
  35                         @ 'Document rename folder error. Is a file path, not a folder path: ' + oldPath
  36                 log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder.fsitem', fsitem
  37                 _ that.exists
  38                     @ newPath
  39                     f_cb( r )
  40                         if r === true
  41                             r_cb_wz_err( ${fsname}RepoError,  renameFile )
  42                                 @ 'Document rename folder error. The new path already exists: ' + newPath
  43                         else
  44                             set fsitem.basename = newName
  45                             set fsitem.path = normalize(path.join(fsitem.dirname, fsitem.basename))
  46                             _ that._changeParentFolder
  47                                 @ fsitem
  48                                 f_cb( changes )
  49                                     log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder.changes', changes
  50                                     _ that.fsCommon.updateItem
  51                                         @ fsitem
  52                                         f_cb( r )
  53                                             r_cb( r )
  54     m _changeParentFolder
  55         param fsitemParent
  56         param callback
  57         var that = this
  58         function change_dirnames_Async
  59             param fsitems
  60             param newDirname
  61             param callback
  62             +
  63             foreach item in fsitems
  64                 log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder.change_dirnames_Async', item
  65                 set item.dirname = newDirname
  66                 set item.path = normalize(path.join(item.dirname, item.basename))
  67             _ async.mapSeries
  68                 @ fsitems
  69                 function
  70                     param fsitem
  71                     param callback
  72                     _ that.fsCommon.updateItem
  73                         @ fsitem
  74                         f_cb( r )
  75                             return
  76                                 _ callback(null, r.item)
  77                 f_cb( newfsitems )
  78                     return
  79                         _ callback(null, newfsitems)
  80         function recurser
  81             param fsitemParent
  82             param changes
  83             return
  84                 new Promise
  85                     function
  86                         param resolve
  87                         _ that.fsCommon.getItemChildren
  88                             @ fsitemParent._id
  89                             f_cb( fsitems )
  90                                 # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder.children of ', fsitemParent._id, fsitemParent.path, fsitems.length
  91                                 if fsitems.length > 0
  92                                     _ change_dirnames_Async
  93                                         @ fsitems
  94                                         @ fsitemParent.path
  95                                         f_cb( updfsitems )
  96                                             foreach upd in updfsitems
  97                                                 log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder.upd', upd
  98                                                 _ changes.push(upd.path)
  99                                                 _ recurser
 100                                                     @ upd
 101                                                     @ changes
 102                                                     ._ then
 103                                                         function
 104                                                             log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder.resolve'
 105                                                             _ resolve()
 106                                 else
 107                                     log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder.last resolve'
 108                                     _ resolve()
 109         var changes = []
 110         _ recurser
 111             @ fsitemParent
 112             @ changes
 113             ._ then
 114                 function
 115                     log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.renameFolder._changeParentFolder ended', changes
 116                     return
 117                         _ callback(null, changes)

   1 $group
   2     $params source|fs.mongodb, fsname|MongoFS

   7             @ filePath
   8             f_cb( fsitem )

  11                     r_cb()
  12                         {
  13                             @ isDirectory
  14                                 function
  15                                     return false
  16                             @ isFile
  17                                 function
  18                                     return false

  21                         {
  22                             @ isDirectory
  23                                 function
  24                                     return fsitem.kind == 0
  25                             @ isFile
  26                                 function
  27                                     return fsitem.kind == 1

.wizzi/ittf/lib/t/fscommon/document/upload.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     $params source|fs.mongodb, fsname|MongoFS
   3     m uploadFolder
   4         string sourcePath
   5         string destPath
   6         options-callback
   7         set options.documentContent = true
   8         var that = this
   9         set sourcePath = normalize(sourcePath)
  10         set destPath = normalize(destPath)
  11         # use disk filesystem
  12         _ vfile
  13             f_cb( file )
  14                 var documents
  15                     _ file.getFiles
  16                         @ sourcePath
  17                         {
  18                             @ deep true
  19                             @ documentContent true
  20                 # log 'wizzi-repo.${source}.document.uploadFolder.documents', sourcePath, options, documents
  21                 var d, destFilePath, len = documents.length
  22                 var uploaded = []
  23                 function repeater
  24                     param index
  25                     if index === len
  26                         return callback(null, uploaded)
  27                     set d = documents[index]
  28                     set destFilePath
  29                         _ path.join
  30                             @ destPath
  31                             @ d.relPath
  32                     if d.content && d.content.length > 0
  33                         _ that.writeFile
  34                             @ destFilePath
  35                             @ d.content
  36                             f_cb( r )
  37                                 _ uploaded.push
  38                                     {
  39                                         @ relPath d.relPath
  40                                         @ dest destFilePath
  41                                         @ result r
  42                                 _ process.nextTick
  43                                     function
  44                                         _ repeater(index + 1)
  45                     else
  46                         _ repeater(index + 1)
  47                 _ repeater(0)

.wizzi/ittf/lib/t/check_wz_not_empty.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params varName, method
   3     var resolved_${varName} = verify.resolveToString(${varName})
   4     # log 'resolved_${varName}', resolved_${varName}
   5     if verify.isNotEmpty(resolved_${varName}) === false
   6         return
   7             _ callback
   8                 _ error
   9                     @ 'InvalidArgument'
  10                     @ '${method}'
  11                     {
  12                         @ parameter '${varName}'
  13                         @ message "'${varName}' must be a not empty string. Received: " + util.inspect(${varName}, { depth: null })
  14     else
  15         set ${varName} = resolved_${varName}

   7             param ${arg2}
   8         $if arg3 != null
   9             param ${arg3}
  10         $if arg4 != null
  11             param ${arg4}
  12         set this.name = '${name}Error'
  13         $hook
  14         # 5/8/17 set this.stack = (new Error()).stack
  15     set ${name}Error.prototype.toString
  16         function
  17             return this.message
  18     set ${name}Error.prototype = Object.create(Error.prototype)
  19     set ${name}Error.prototype.constructor = ${name}Error
  20     set md.${name}Error = ${name}Error
  21     +

.wizzi/ittf/lib/t/repeater.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params coll, retval
   3     var
   4         decl ${coll}_item
   5         decl ${coll}_len = ${coll}.length
   6     function repeater
   7         param index
   8         if index === ${coll}_len
   9             return callback(null, ${retval})
  10         set ${coll}_item = ${coll}[index]
  11         $hook
  12         _ process.nextTick
  13             function
  14                 _ repeater(index + 1)
  15     _ repeater(0)

.wizzi/ittf/lib/t/throw_error.js.ittf

   2     $params errorName
   3     throw
   4         new errors.${errorName}Error
   5             $hook

.wizzi/ittf/lib/utils/_ild_objectId.js.ittf

                                

   1 module
   2     kind jsfile
   3     const os = require('os')
   4     const crypto = require('crypto')
   5     class ObjectId
   6         ctor
   7             param id
   8             if id
   9                 set this.id = id
  10                 set this.generationTime = new Date()
  11                 return
  12             #
  13                 # Generates a MongoDB-style ObjectId in Node.js. Uses nanosecond timestamp in place of counter;
  14                 # should be impossible for same process to generate multiple objectId in same nanosecond? (clock
  15                 # drift can result in an *extremely* remote possibility of id conflicts).
  16                 # @returns {string} Id in same format as MongoDB ObjectId.
  17             const seconds = Math.floor(new Date()/1000).toString(16)
  18             const machineId = crypto.createHash('md5').update(os.hostname()).digest('hex').slice(0, 6)
  19             const processId = process.pid.toString(16).slice(0, 4).padStart(4, '0')
  20             const counter = process.hrtime()[1].toString(16).slice(0, 6).padStart(6, '0')
  21             set this.id = seconds + machineId + processId + counter
  22             set this.generationTime = new Date()
  23         m equals
  24             param otherID
  25             return this.id == otherID.id
  26         m toString
  27             return this.id
  28     set module.exports = ObjectId

.wizzi/ittf/lib/utils/collection.js.ittf

                                

   1 module
   2     kind jsfile
   3     const errors = require('./errors')
   4     const ObjectID = require('./objectId')
   5     function match
   6         param key
   7         param item
   8         # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match', key, item
   9         if !key
  10             # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match: true'
  11             return true
  12         elif key.hasOwnProperty('_id')
  13             if item._id == null && key._id == null
  14                 return true
  15             if item._id && item._id.equals(key._id)
  16                 # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match: true'
  17                 return true
  18         elif key.hasOwnProperty('path')
  19             if item.path == normalize(key.path)
  20                 # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match: true'
  21                 return true
  22         elif key.hasOwnProperty('basename') && key.hasOwnProperty('parentId')
  23             if item.basename === key.basename
  24                 if item.parentId == null && key.parentId == null
  25                     # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match: true'
  26                     return true
  27                 if item.parentId && item.parentId.equals(key.parentId)
  28                     # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match: true'
  29                     return true
  30         elif key.hasOwnProperty('parentId')
  31             if item.parentId == null && key.parentId == null
  32                 return true
  33             if item.parentId && item.parentId.equals(key.parentId)
  34                 # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match: true'
  35                 return true
  36         # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.match: false'
  37         return false
  38     class Collection
  39         ctor
  40             param items
  41             set items = items || []
  42             if items.classType === 'wizzi-repo.utils.Collection'
  43                 set this.items = items.items
  44             else
  45                 set this.items = items
  46                 _ this.restoreIds
  47             set this.classType = 'wizzi-repo.utils.Collection'
  48         m restoreIds
  49             foreach item in this.items
  50                 if item._id && item._id.length
  51                     # log 'restoreIds._id', item._id, item._id.length
  52                     set item._id = ObjectID.createFromHexString(item._id)
  53                 if item.parentId && item.parentId.length
  54                     # log 'restoreIds.parentId', item.parentId, item.parentId.length
  55                     set item.parentId = ObjectID.createFromHexString(item.parentId)
  56         m count
  57             param key
  58             return this.items.length
  59         m find
  60             param key
  61             # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.find', key
  62             var result = []
  63             foreach item in this.items
  64                 if match(key, item)
  65                     _ result.push(item)
  66             return new Collection(result)
  67         m insertOne
  68             param doc
  69             param options
  70             param callback
  71             if typeof(callback) == 'undefined'
  72                 set callback = options
  73                 set options = null
  74             # log 'insertOne.doc', doc
  75             if !doc._id
  76                 set doc._id = new ObjectID()
  77             else
  78                 var items
  79                     _ this.find
  80                         {
  81                             @ _id doc._id
  82                 if items.count() > 0
  83                     _ callback
  84                         new errors.RepoCollectionError('Duplicated key')
  85             _ this.items.push
  86                 @ doc
  87             return
  88                 _ callback
  89                     @ null
  90                     {
  91                         @ insertedCount 1
  92                         @ insertedId doc._id
  93                         [ ops
  94                             @ doc
  95                         { result
  96                             @ ok 1
  97                             @ n 1
  98         m replaceOne
  99             param key
 100             param doc
 101             param options
 102             param callback
 103             if typeof(callback) == 'undefined'
 104                 set callback = options
 105                 set options = {}
 106             var temp = []
 107             var scannedCount = 0
 108             var modifiedCount = 0
 109             var upsertedCount = 0
 110             var ops = []
 111             foreach item in this.items
 112                 set scannedCount++
 113                 if match(key, item)
 114                     if modifiedCount == 0
 115                         _ temp.push(doc)
 116                         set modifiedCount++
 117                         _ ops.push(doc)
 118                     else
 119                         return
 120                             _ callback
 121                                 new errors.RepoCollectionError('More than one item key match replaceOne')
 122                 else
 123                     _ temp.push(item)
 124             if modifiedCount == 0
 125                 if options.upsert
 126                     if !doc._id
 127                         set doc._id = new ObjectID()
 128                     _ temp.push(doc)
 129                     set upsertedCount++
 130                     _ ops.push(doc)
 131                 else
 132                     return
 133                         _ callback
 134                             new errors.RepoCollectionError('Key not found')
 135             set this.items = temp
 136             return
 137                 _ callback
 138                     @ null
 139                     {
 140                         @ modifiedCount modifiedCount
 141                         @ upsertedCount upsertedCount
 142                         { upsertedId
 143                             @ _id (upsertedCount > 0 ? doc._id : null )
 144                         @ ops ops
 145                         { result
 146                             @ ok 1
 147                             @ n scannedCount
 148                             @ nModified (modifiedCount + upsertedCount)
 149         m deleteOne
 150             param key
 151             param callback
 152             var temp = []
 153             var deletedCount = 0
 154             foreach item in this.items
 155                 if match(key, item)
 156                     if deletedCount == 0
 157                         set deletedCount++
 158                     else
 159                         return
 160                             _ callback
 161                                 new errors.RepoCollectionError('More than one item key match deleteOne')
 162                 else
 163                     _ temp.push(item)
 164             set this.items = temp
 165             return
 166                 _ callback
 167                     @ null
 168                     {
 169                         @ deletedCount deletedCount
 170                         { result
 171                             @ ok 1
 172                             @ n deletedCount
 173         m deleteMany
 174             param key
 175             param callback
 176             var temp = []
 177             var deletedCount = 0
 178             foreach item in this.items
 179                 if match(key, item)
 180                     set deletedCount++
 181                 else
 182                     _ temp.push(item)
 183             set this.items = temp
 184             return
 185                 _ callback
 186                     @ null
 187                     {
 188                         @ deletedCount deletedCount
 189                         { result
 190                             @ ok 1
 191                             @ n deletedCount
 192         m toArray
 193             callback
 194             # log 'wizzi-repo.utils.collection.toArray'
 195             _ callback(null, this.items)
 196     function normalize
 197         param path
 198         return path.trim().replace(/\\/g,'/').toLowerCase()
 199     set module.exports = Collection

.wizzi/ittf/lib/utils/fsstream.js.ittf

                                

   1 module wizzi-repo.lib.utils.FsStream
   2     kind jsfile
   3     class FsStream
   4         ctor
   5             param filePath
   6             param document
   7             set this.filePath = filePath
   8             set this.document = document
   9             set this.buffer = []
  10         m write
  11             param text
  12             _ this.buffer.push(text)
  13         m end
  14             param callback
  15             _ this.document.writeFile
  16                 @ this.filePath

  20                     param result

  23                             _ callback(err)
  24                         else
  25                             _ callback(null, result)
  26     set module.exports = FsStream

.wizzi/ittf/lib/utils/objectId.js.ittf

                                

   1 module
   2     kind jsfile
   3     # This is copied, but from WHO?
   4     var MACHINE_ID = parseInt(Math.random() * 0xffffff, 10)
   5     var checkForHexRegExp
   6         new RegExp('^[0-9a-fA-F]{24}$')
   7     try
   8         if Buffer && Buffer.from
   9             var hasBufferType = true
  10     catch err
  11         set hasBufferType = false
  12     var ObjectID
  13         function ObjectID
  14             param id
  15             if id instanceof ObjectID
  16                 return id
  17             if ! (this instanceof ObjectID)
  18                 return
  19                     new ObjectID(id)
  20             set this._bsontype = 'ObjectID'
  21             if (id == null) || (typeof (id) === 'number')
  22                 set this.id = this.generate(id)
  23                 if ObjectID.cacheHexString
  24                     set this.__id = this.toString('hex')
  25                 return
  26             var valid = ObjectID.isValid(id)
  27             if (! (valid) && (id != null))
  28                 throw
  29                     new Error('Argument passed in must be a single String of 12 bytes or a string of 24 hex characters')
  30             elif valid && (typeof (id) === 'string') && id.length === 24 && hasBufferType
  31                 return
  32                     new ObjectID
  33                         new Buffer(id, 'hex')
  34             elif valid && (typeof (id) === 'string') && id.length === 24
  35                 return ObjectID.createFromHexString(id)
  36             elif id != null && id.length === 12
  37                 set this.id = id
  38             elif id != null && id.toHexString
  39                 return id
  40             else
  41                 throw
  42                     new Error('Argument passed in must be a single String of 12 bytes or a string of 24 hex characters')
  43             if ObjectID.cacheHexString
  44                 set this.__id = this.toString('hex')
  45     var hexTable
  46         [
  47     for var i = 0; i < 256; i++
  48         set hexTable[i] = ((i <= 15 ? '0' : '') + i.toString(16))
  49     set ObjectID.prototype.toHexString =
  50         function
  51             if ObjectID.cacheHexString && this.__id
  52                 return this.__id
  53             var hexString = ''
  54             if (! (this.id) || ! (this.id.length))
  55                 throw
  56                     new Error(((('invalid ObjectId, ObjectId.id must be either a string or a Buffer, but is [' + JSON.stringify(this.id))) + ']'))
  57             if this.id instanceof _Buffer
  58                 set hexString = convertToHex(this.id)
  59                 if ObjectID.cacheHexString
  60                     set this.__id = hexString
  61                 return hexString
  62             for var i = 0; i < this.id.length; i++
  63                 set hexString += hexTable[this.id.charCodeAt(i)]
  64             if ObjectID.cacheHexString
  65                 set this.__id = hexString
  66             return hexString
  67     set ObjectID.prototype.get_inc =
  68         function
  69             return ObjectID.index = (ObjectID.index + 1) % 0xffffff
  70     set ObjectID.prototype.getInc =
  71         function
  72             return this.get_inc()
  73     set ObjectID.prototype.generate =
  74         function
  75             param time
  76             if 'number' !== typeof (time)
  77                 set time = ~ (~ (Date.now() / 1000))
  78             var pid = (((typeof (process) === 'undefined') || (process.pid === 1)) ? Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000) : process.pid) % 0xffff
  79             var inc = this.get_inc()
  80             var buffer
  81                 new Buffer(12)
  82             set buffer[3] = time & 0xff
  83             set buffer[2] = (((time >> 8)) & 0xff)
  84             set buffer[1] = (((time >> 16)) & 0xff)
  85             set buffer[0] = (((time >> 24)) & 0xff)
  86             set buffer[6] = MACHINE_ID & 0xff
  87             set buffer[5] = (((MACHINE_ID >> 8)) & 0xff)
  88             set buffer[4] = (((MACHINE_ID >> 16)) & 0xff)
  89             set buffer[8] = pid & 0xff
  90             set buffer[7] = (((pid >> 8)) & 0xff)
  91             set buffer[11] = inc & 0xff
  92             set buffer[10] = (((inc >> 8)) & 0xff)
  93             set buffer[9] = (((inc >> 16)) & 0xff)
  94             return buffer
  95     set ObjectID.prototype.toString =
  96         function
  97             param format
  98             if this.id && this.id.copy
  99                 return this.id.toString(typeof (format) === 'string' ? format : 'hex')
 100             return this.toHexString()
 101     set ObjectID.prototype.inspect = ObjectID.prototype.toString
 102     set ObjectID.prototype.toJSON =
 103         function
 104             return this.toHexString()
 105     set ObjectID.prototype.equals =
 106         function equals
 107             param otherId
 108             if otherId instanceof ObjectID
 109                 return this.toString() === otherId.toString()
 110             elif typeof (otherId) === 'string' && ObjectID.isValid(otherId) && otherId.length === 12 && (this.id instanceof _Buffer)
 111                 return otherId === this.id.toString('binary')
 112             elif typeof (otherId) === 'string' && ObjectID.isValid(otherId) && otherId.length === 24
 113                 return otherId.toLowerCase() === this.toHexString()
 114             elif typeof (otherId) === 'string' && ObjectID.isValid(otherId) && otherId.length === 12
 115                 return otherId === this.id
 116             elif otherId != null && (otherId instanceof ObjectID || otherId.toHexString)
 117                 return otherId.toHexString() === this.toHexString()
 118             else
 119                 return false
 120     set ObjectID.prototype.getTimestamp =
 121         function
 122             var timestamp
 123                 new Date()
 124             var time = (((this.id[3] | (this.id[2] << 8)) | (this.id[1] << 16))) | (this.id[0] << 24)
 125             _ timestamp.setTime(Math.floor(time) * 1000)
 126             return timestamp
 127     set ObjectID.index = ~ (~ (Math.random() * 0xffffff))
 128     set ObjectID.createPk =
 129         function createPk
 130             return
 131                 new ObjectID()
 132     set ObjectID.createFromTime =
 133         function createFromTime
 134             param time
 135             var buffer
 136                 new Buffer
 137                     [
 138                         @ 0
 139                         @ 0
 140                         @ 0
 141                         @ 0
 142                         @ 0
 143                         @ 0
 144                         @ 0
 145                         @ 0
 146                         @ 0
 147                         @ 0
 148                         @ 0
 149                         @ 0
 150             set buffer[3] = time & 0xff
 151             set buffer[2] = (((time >> 8)) & 0xff)
 152             set buffer[1] = (((time >> 16)) & 0xff)
 153             set buffer[0] = (((time >> 24)) & 0xff)
 154             return
 155                 new ObjectID(buffer)
 156     var decodeLookup
 157         [
 158     set i = 0
 159     while i < 10
 160         set decodeLookup[(0x30 + i)] = i++
 161     while i < 16
 162         set decodeLookup[(((0x41 - 10)) + i)] = decodeLookup[(((0x61 - 10)) + i)] = i++
 163     var _Buffer = Buffer
 164     var convertToHex
 165         function
 166             param bytes
 167             return bytes.toString('hex')
 168     set ObjectID.createFromHexString =
 169         function createFromHexString
 170             param string
 171             if typeof(string) === 'undefined' || (string != null && string.length !== 24)
 172                 throw
 173                     new Error('Argument passed in must be a single String of 12 bytes or a string of 24 hex characters')
 174             if hasBufferType
 175                 return
 176                     new ObjectID
 177                         new Buffer(string, 'hex')
 178             var array
 179                 new _Buffer(12)
 180             var n = 0
 181             var i = 0
 182             while i < 24
 183                 set array[n++] = ((decodeLookup[string.charCodeAt(i++)] << 4) | decodeLookup[string.charCodeAt(i++)])
 184             return
 185                 new ObjectID(array)
 186     set ObjectID.isValid =
 187         function isValid
 188             param id
 189             if id == null
 190                 return false
 191             if typeof (id) === 'number'
 192                 return true
 193             if typeof (id) === 'string'
 194                 return ((id.length === 12) || (((id.length === 24) && checkForHexRegExp.test(id))))
 195             if id instanceof ObjectID
 196                 return true
 197             if id instanceof _Buffer
 198                 return true
 199             if id.toHexString
 200                 return ((id.id.length === 12) || (((id.id.length === 24) && checkForHexRegExp.test(id.id))))
 201             return false
 202     _ Object.defineProperty
 203         @ ObjectID.prototype
 204         @ 'generationTime'
 205         {
 206             @ enumerable true
 207             @ get
 208                 function
 209                     return (((((this.id[3] | (this.id[2] << 8))) | (this.id[1] << 16))) | (this.id[0] << 24))
 210             @ set
 211                 function
 212                     param value
 213                     set this.id[3] = value & 0xff
 214                     set this.id[2] = (((value >> 8)) & 0xff)
 215                     set this.id[1] = (((value >> 16)) & 0xff)
 216                     set this.id[0] = (((value >> 24)) & 0xff)
 217     set module.exports = ObjectID
 218     set module.exports.ObjectID = ObjectID
 219     set module.exports.ObjectId = ObjectID

.wizzi/ittf/lib/errors.js.ittf

Fragments

  • error 
                                

   1 module
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import util
   4     var utils = require('./repo/utils')
   5     +
   6     var md = module.exports = {}
   7     +
   8     error( NotImplemented,  message )
   9         log 'message', message
  10         set this.message = message
  11     +
  12     error( InvalidRequest,  message,  code )
  13         log 'message', message
  14         set this.message = message
  15         set this.code = code
  16     error( FsItemNotFound,  resourceType,  uri )
  17         set this.message = resourceType + ': ' + uri + ' not found '
  18     error( IttfNotFound,  resourceType,  name,  sourceUri )
  19         set this.message = resourceType + ': ' + name +
  20             \ ' not found, processing document ' + utils.getSrcPathInfo(sourceUri)

.wizzi/ittf/root/t/browser.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $if isWebpackTarget
   3         #
   4             # browser virtual file service
   5             # params
   6             # { options
   7         set md.browserfile
   8             function
   9                 param options
  10                 param callback
  11                 if typeof callback === 'undefined'
  12                     set callback = options
  13                     set options = {}
  14                 _ vfile
  15                     @ callback

  44     #
  45         # params
  46         # { options
  47         # string storeKind
  48         # oneOf filesystem, mongodb, localstorage
  49         # string storeUri
  50         # when storeKind == mongodb
  51         # string storeBaseFolder

  53     set md.createStoreFactory
  54         function createStoreFactory
  55             { options
  56                 string storeKind
  57                     optional
  58             callback
  59             +
  60             # log 'wizzi-repo.index.createStoreFactory.options', options
  61             +
  62             var storeKind = options.storeKind || 'filesystem'
  63             if checkStoreKind(storeKind) == false
  64                 return
  65                     _ callback
  66                         _ error
  67                             @ 'InvalidArgument'
  68                             @ 'createStoreFactory'
  69                             {
  70                                 @ parameter 'storeKind'
  71                                 @ message 'invalid storeKind: ' + storeKind + '. Received: ' + storeKind
  72             +
  73             if storeKind == 'mongodb'
  74                 if verify.isNotEmpty(options.storeUri) === false
  75                     r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  createStoreFactory )
  76                         @ 'The parameter `options.storeUri` is required and must be a string. Received: ' + options.storeUri
  77                 if verify.isNotEmpty(options.storeBaseFolder) === false
  78                     r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  createStoreFactory )
  79                         @ 'The parameter `options.storeBaseFolder` is required and must be a string. Received: ' + options.storeUri
  80             elif storeKind == 'json'
  81                 if verify.isObject(options.storeJsonFsData) === false && verify.isObject(options.storeFsJson) === false
  82                     r_cb_wz_err( InvalidArgument,  createStoreFactory )
  83                         @ 'The parameter `options.storeJsonFsData` or `options.storeFsJson`is required and must be an object.'
  84             return
  85                 _ callback
  86                     @ null
  87                     _ getCreateStore
  88                         @ storeKind
  89                         @ options
  90     function getCreateStore
  91         string storeKind
  92         { options
  93         return
  94             function createStore
  95                 param callback
  96                 var store
  97                     new IttfDocumentStore()
  98                 _ store.init
  99                     {
 100                         @ storeKind storeKind
 101                         @ storeUri options.storeUri
 102                         @ storeBaseFolder options.storeBaseFolder
 103                         @ storeJsonFsData options.storeJsonFsData
 104                         @ storeFsJson options.storeFsJson
 105                     f_cb( notUsed )
 106                         return
 107                             _ callback
 108                                 @ null
 109                                 @ store
 110     function checkStoreKind
 111         param kind
 112         return ['filesystem', 'mongodb', 'json', 'browser'].indexOf(kind) > -1
 113     # TODO fileService.getFilesAsync
 114     set md.folderFilesInfoByPath
 115         function
 116             param folderPath
 117             param fileService
 118             param callback
 119             log 'wizzi-repo.folderFilesInfoByPath', folderPath
 120             _ fileService.getFilesAsync
 121                 @ folderPath
 122                 {
 123                     @ deep true
 124                 f_cb( files )
 125                     var result = []
 126                     foreach f in files
 127                         _ result.push
 128                             _ fileInfoByPath
 129                                 @ f.fullPath
 130                                 @ folderPath
 131                     r_cb( result )
 132     set md.ittfDocumentInfoByPath
 133         function
 134             param filePath
 135             var result = fileInfoByPath(filePath)
 136             if result.isIttfDocument
 137                 return result
 138             else
 139                 return
 140                     {
 141                         @ is_error true
 142                         @ message 'The file is not an ittfdocument: ' + result.fullPath

.wizzi/ittf/root/readme.md.ittf

Fragments

  • common/kernel 
                                

   1 common/kernel( wizzi-repo,  ${wfpackage.title}. )
   2     h2 Features
   3     ul
   4         li Filesystem ittf documents store
   5         li MongoDb ittf documents store
   6     h3 Interface
   7     js
   8         + repo.createStoreFactory(
   9         + options,
  10         + callback
  11         + );
  12     h4 Options
  13     table
  14         tr
  15             td storeKind
  16             td oneOf 'filesystem', 'mongodb'
  17         tr
  18             td storeUri
  19             td when storeKind == 'mongodb'
  20                 br
  21                 span the uri of the mongodb instance
  22         tr
  23             td storeBaseFolder
  24             td when storeKind == 'mongodb'
  25                 br
  26                 span the virtual filesystem base folder
  27     h4 Returns
  28     p A function that can be called to obtain a
  29         a wizzi-repo.ittfDocumentStore
  30             href
  31         span interface.
  32     h3 Usage
  33     js
  34         + var repo = require('wizzi-repo');
  35         +
  36         + ...
  37         +
  38         + repo.createStoreFactory(
  39         + {
  40         + storeKind: 'filesystem'
  41         + },
  42         + function (err, createStore) {
  43         + }
  44         + );

.wizzi/ittf/t/checked_call_return_set.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params varName
   3     set ${varName}
   4         $hook
   5     if ${varName} && ${varName}.__is_error
   6         return ${varName}

.wizzi/ittf/t/checked_call_return.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params varName
   3     var ${varName}
   4         $hook
   5     if ${varName} && ${varName}.__is_error
   6         return ${varName}

.wizzi/ittf/t/checked_call.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params varName, message|@@null
   3     var ${varName}
   4         $hook
   5     if ${varName} && ${varName}.__is_error
   6         log '__is_error ${message}', ${varName}
   7         return callback(${varName})

.wizzi/ittf/t/error.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, arg1|@@null, arg2|@@null, arg3|@@null, arg4|@@null
   3     function ${name}Error
   4         $if arg1 != null
   5             param ${arg1}
   6         $if arg2 != null
   7             param ${arg2}
   8         $if arg3 != null
   9             param ${arg3}
  10         $if arg4 != null
  11             param ${arg4}
  12         set this.name = '${name}Error'
  13         $hook
  14         # 5/8/17 set this.stack = (new Error()).stack
  15     set ${name}Error.prototype.toString
  16         function
  17             return this.message
  18     set ${name}Error.prototype = Object.create(Error.prototype)
  19     set ${name}Error.prototype.constructor = ${name}Error
  20     set md.${name}Error = ${name}Error
  21     +

.wizzi/ittf/t/f_cb_done.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params result|notUsed
   3     function
   4         param err
   5         param ${result}
   6         if err
   7             log 'err', err
   8             throw new Error(err.message)
   9         $hook
  10         _ done

.wizzi/ittf/t/f_cb_no_err.js.ittf

   3     function
   4         param err
   5         param ${result}
   6         $hook

.wizzi/ittf/t/f_cb.js.ittf

.wizzi/ittf/t/r_cb_error.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     return
   3         _ callback
   4             _ this.error
   5                 $hook

.wizzi/ittf/t/r_cb_wz_err.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params errorCode, method, inner|@@null
   3     return
   4         _ callback
   5             _ error
   6                 @ '${errorCode}'
   7                 @ '${method}'
   8                 $hook
   9                 $if inner != null
  10                     @ ${inner}

.wizzi/ittf/t/r_cb.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params result|@@null
   3     return
   4         _ callback
   5             @ null
   6             $if result !== null
   7                 @ ${result}
   8             $hook

.wizzi/ittf/t/r_wz_err.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params errorCode, method, inner|@@null
   3     return
   4         _ error
   5             @ '${errorCode}'
   6             @ '${method}'
   7             $hook
   8             $if inner != null
   9                 @ ${inner}

   5             $hook
   6     return
   7         _ callback
   8             @ error

.wizzi/ittf/tests_stop/json/t/fsjson/createItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_test 
                                

   1 $group
   2     describe insert a filesystem item
   3         it-async should insert a root folder
   4             _ fsJson.insertItem
   5                 {
   6                     @ parentId null
   7                     @ basename 'c:'
   8                     @ dirname null
   9                     @ kind 0
  10                 f_cb_test( r )
  11                     log 'insertItem.r', err, r
  12                     tobe_number( r.insertedCount,  1 )
  13                     tobe_string( r.code,  FSITEM_INSERTED )
  14                     tobe_object( r.item )
  15                     tobe_string( r.item.path,  c: )
  16                     tobe_typeof( r.item._id,  object)
  17                     _ done
  18         it-async should get an existing item
  19             _ fsJson.getItem
  20                 {
  21                     @ parentId null
  22                     @ basename 'c:'
  23                 f_cb_test( r )
  24                     log 'getItem.r', err, r
  25                     tobe_object( r )
  26                     tobe_null( r.parentId )
  27                     tobe_string( r.basename,  c: )
  28                     _ done
  29         it-async should say the item already exists
  30             _ fsJson.insertItem
  31                 {
  32                     @ parentId null
  33                     @ basename 'c:'
  34                     @ dirname null
  35                     @ kind 0
  36                 f_cb_test( r )
  37                     log 'insertItem.r', err, r
  38                     tobe_string( r.code,  FSITEM_EXISTS )
  39                     tobe_object( r.item )
  40                     tobe_string( r.item.path,  c: )
  41                     _ done
  42         it-async should insert a root child
  43             _ fsJson.getItem
  44                 {
  45                     @ parentId null
  46                     @ basename 'c:'
  47                 f_cb_test( r )
  48                     _ fsJson.insertItem
  49                         {
  50                             @ parentId r.parentId
  51                             @ basename 'hello.txt'
  52                             @ dirname r.basename
  53                             @ kind 1
  54                         f_cb_test( r )
  55                             log 'insertItem.r', err, r
  56                             tobe_number( r.insertedCount,  1 )
  57                             tobe_string( r.code,  FSITEM_INSERTED )
  58                             tobe_object( r.item )
  59                             tobe_string( r.item.path,  c:/hello.txt )
  60                             set hellotxt_item = r.item
  61                             _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests_stop/json/t/fsjson/deleteItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_test 
                                

   1 $group
   2     describe delete a filesystem item
   3         it-async should delete a root child
   4             _ fsJson.deleteItem
   5                 @ hellotxt_item._id
   6                 f_cb_test( r )
   7                     log 'deletedItem.r', err, r
   8                     tobe_number( r.n,  1 )
   9                     tobe_string( r.code,  FSITEM_DELETED )
  10                     _ done

Fragments

  • f_cb_test 
                                

   1 $group
   2     describe update a filesystem item
   3         it-async should write a document content

   5             _ fsJson.writeFile
   6                 @ hellotxt_item._id
   7                 @ 'hello world'
   8                 f_cb_test( r )
   9                     log 'writeFile.r', err, r
  10                     # tobe_number( r.n, 1 )
  11                     tobe_string( r.code,  DOCUMENT_WRITTEN )
  12                     _ done

  18                 @ storeKind 'happy'
  19             f_cb_no_err()
  20                 tobe_object( err )

  22                 # log 'should return InvalidStoreKind error 2.err', err

  25                 _ done()

  28             {

  30             f_cb_no_err()

  32                 tobe_true( err.__is_error )
  33                 tobe_string( err.name,  InvalidArgument )

  35                 _ done()

  43                 tobe_true( err.__is_error )
  44                 tobe_string( err.name,  InvalidArgument )

  54                 tobe_null( err )

.wizzi/ittf/tests_stop/mongodb/uriParser.js.ittf

                                

   1 base_test( mongodb.uriParser )

   5         var errors = require('../../lib/repo/errors')

   7     var store
   8         new IttfDocumentStore
   9     var finder
  10     +
  11     before-async
  12         _ del.sync
  13             @ [__dirname + '/dummydocfinder/**']
  14             {
  15                 @ force true
  16         _ store.init
  17             {
  18                 @ storeKind 'filesystem'

  20                 log 'err, result', err, result
  21                 set finder = new IttfDocumentFinder(store, 'js')
  22                 _ done()

  26                 @ ittfDocumentUri null

  28                 @ includerModelKey null

   1 base_test( utils.collection )
   2     $append imports
   3         var errors = require('../../lib/utils/errors')
   4         var ObjectId = require('../../lib/utils/objectId')
   5         var Collection = require('../../lib/utils/collection')
   6     var rootId = new ObjectId
   7     var child_aId = new ObjectId
   8     var item_root
   9         {
  10             @ _id rootId
  11             @ parentId null
  12             @ path '/'
  13     var item_a
  14         {
  15             @ _id child_aId
  16             @ parentId rootId
  17             @ path '/a'
  18     var item_a_1
  19         {
  20             @ _id new ObjectId()
  21             @ parentId child_aId
  22             @ path '/a/1'
  23     var item_a_2
  24         {
  25             @ _id new ObjectId()
  26             @ parentId child_aId
  27             @ path '/a/1'
  28     it-async should create a collection and extract it with the toArray() async method
  29         var c
  30             new Collection
  31                 [
  32                     @ item_root
  33                     @ item_a
  34         _ c.toArray
  35             f_cb_test( items )
  36                 tobe_array( items,  2)
  37                 _ done
  38     it-async should create a collection and insert one item without _id
  39         var c
  40             new Collection
  41         _ c.insertOne
  42             {
  43             f_cb_test( result )
  44                 tobe_object( result)
  45                 tobe_number( result.insertedCount,  1)
  46                 tobe_number( result.result.ok,  1)
  47                 tobe_number( result.result.n,  1)
  48                 tobe_number( result.insertedId.id.length,  24)
  49                 _ c.toArray
  50                     f_cb_test( items )
  51                         tobe_array( items,  1)
  52                         _ done
  53     it-async should create a collection and insert one item with _id
  54         var c
  55             new Collection
  56         _ c.insertOne
  57             @ item_root
  58             f_cb_test( result )
  59                 tobe_object( result)
  60                 tobe_number( result.insertedCount,  1)
  61                 tobe_number( result.result.ok,  1)
  62                 tobe_number( result.result.n,  1)
  63                 tobe_equal( result.insertedId,  rootId)
  64                 _ c.toArray
  65                     f_cb_test( items )
  66                         tobe_array( items,  1)
  67                         tobe_equal( items[0]._id.toString(),  item_root._id.toString())
  68                         _ done
  69     it-async should give a Duplicated key error
  70         var c
  71             new Collection
  72                 [
  73                     @ item_root
  74         _ c.insertOne
  75             @ item_root
  76             f_cb_no_err( result )
  77                 # log 'err', err, 'result', result
  78                 tobe_typeof( err,  errors.RepoCollectionError )
  79                 tobe_string( err.message,  Duplicated key )
  80                 _ done
  81     it-async should delete one item
  82         var c
  83             new Collection
  84                 [
  85                     @ item_root
  86                     @ item_a
  87         tobe_number( c.count(),  2 )
  88         _ c.deleteOne
  89             {
  90                 @ _id item_root._id
  91             f_cb_test( result )
  92                 log result
  93                 tobe_number( result.deletedCount,  1 )
  94                 tobe_number( result.result.n,  1 )
  95                 tobe_number( result.result.ok,  1 )
  96                 tobe_number( c.count(),  1 )
  97                 _ done
  98     it-async should delete many items
  99         var c
 100             new Collection
 101                 [
 102                     @ item_root
 103                     @ item_a
 104                     @ item_a_1
 105                     @ item_a_2
 106         tobe_number( c.count(),  4 )
 107         _ c.deleteMany
 108             {
 109                 @ parentId item_a._id
 110             f_cb_test( result )
 111                 log result
 112                 tobe_number( result.deletedCount,  2 )
 113                 tobe_number( result.result.n,  2 )
 114                 tobe_number( result.result.ok,  1 )
 115                 tobe_number( c.count(),  2 )
 116                 _ done
 117     it-async should replace one item
 118         var c
 119             new Collection
 120                 [
 121                     @ item_root
 122                     @ item_a
 123         set item_root.newField = 20
 124         _ c.replaceOne
 125             {
 126                 @ _id item_root._id
 127             @ item_root
 128             f_cb_test( result )
 129                 log result
 130                 tobe_number( result.modifiedCount,  1 )
 131                 tobe_number( result.upsertedCount,  0 )
 132                 tobe_number( result.result.ok,  1 )
 133                 # scanned
 134                 tobe_number( result.result.n,  2 )
 135                 tobe_number( result.result.nModified,  1 )
 136                 tobe_array( result.ops,  1 )
 137                 tobe_number( c.count(),  2 )
 138                 _ done
 139     it-async should replace upsert an item
 140         var c
 141             new Collection
 142                 [
 143                     @ item_root
 144         _ c.replaceOne
 145             {
 146                 @ _id item_a._id
 147             @ item_a
 148             {
 149                 @ upsert true
 150             f_cb_test( result )
 151                 log result
 152                 tobe_number( result.modifiedCount,  0 )
 153                 tobe_number( result.upsertedCount,  1 )
 154                 tobe_array( result.ops,  1 )
 155                 tobe_number( c.count(),  2 )
 156                 _ done
 157     it-async should give an error trying to replace a non existing item
 158         var c
 159             new Collection
 160                 [
 161                     @ item_root
 162         _ c.replaceOne
 163             {
 164                 @ _id item_a._id
 165             @ item_a
 166             f_cb_no_err( result )
 167                 tobe_typeof( err,  errors.RepoCollectionError )
 168                 tobe_string( err.message,  Key not found )
 169                 _ done
 170     it-async should find an item by id
 171         var c
 172             new Collection
 173                 [
 174                     @ item_root
 175                     @ item_a
 176         var items
 177             _ c.find
 178                 {
 179                     @ _id item_root._id
 180         tobe_number( items.count(),  1 )
 181         _ items.toArray
 182             f_cb( result)
 183                 tobe_array( result,  1)
 184                 _ done
 185     it-async should find an item by path
 186         var c
 187             new Collection
 188                 [
 189                     @ item_root
 190                     @ item_a
 191         var items
 192             _ c.find
 193                 {
 194                     @ path item_root.path
 195         tobe_number( items.count(),  1 )
 196         _ items.toArray
 197             f_cb( result)
 198                 tobe_array( result,  1)
 199                 _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests_stop/utils/objectid.js.ittf

                                

   1 base_test( utils.objectId )
   2     $append imports
   3         var ObjectId = require('../../lib/utils/objectId')
   4     it should create an objectId
   5         var id = new ObjectId
   6         log 'ObjectId.id', id
   7         tobe_object( id)
   8         tobe_number( id.toString().length,  24)

.wizzi/ittf/tests/json/t/json_after_async.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_test 
                                

   1 after-async
   2     if typeof(fsimpl) != 'undefined'
   3         _ fsimpl.toJson
   4             f_cb_test( json )
   5                 _ console.log
   6                     _ JSON.stringify(json, null, 2)
   7                 _ done
   8     else
   9         _ fsJson.toJson
  10             f_cb_test( json )
  11                 _ console.log
  12                     _ JSON.stringify(json, null, 2)
  13                 _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests/json/t/json_before_async.js.ittf
