.wizzi/ittf/tests/json/fsimpl.js.ittf

Fragments

  • base_test
  • json_before_async
  • json_after_async
  • f_cb_test
  • fscommon/fsimpl/writeFile 
                                

   1 base_test( json.fsimpl )
   2     +
   3     $append imports
   4         var
   5             decl JsonFsImpl = require('../../lib/json/jsonFsimpl')
   6             decl FsJson = require('../../lib/json/fs/fsjson')
   7             decl Document = require('../../lib/json/fs/document')
   8             decl fsJson
   9             decl doc
  10     var fsimpl
  11         new JsonFsImpl
  12             @ null
  13     $include json_before_async
  14     before-async
  15         _ fsimpl.open
  16             f_cb_test()
  17                 _ done
  18     fscommon/fsimpl/writeFile( c: )
  19     after-async
  20         _ fsimpl.close
  21         _ done
  22     $include json_after_async

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mocks/misc.js.ittf

                                

   1 module
   2     kind jsfile
   3     import path
   4     var file = require('wizzi-utils').file
   5     var IttfDocumentStore = require('../../lib/repo/ittfDocumentStore')
   6     set module.exports
   7         {
   8             @ IttfDocumentStore IttfDocumentStore
   9             @ ProductionManager
  10                 {
  11                     @ productionContext
  12                         {
  13                             @ aclstat
  14                                 {
  15                             @ addIttfDocument
  16                                 function
  17                                     param uri
  18                                     param content
  19                             @ addMixedIttfModel
  20                                 function
  21                                     param uri
  22                                     param content
  23                             @ addEvaluatedIttfModel
  24                                 function
  25                                     param uri
  26                                     param content
  27                             @ addIttfModelBuildUpScript
  28                                 function
  29                                     param uri
  30                                     param jsScriptCoder
  31             @ ProductionContext
  32                 {
  33                     @ IttfDocumentStoreType IttfDocumentStore
  34                     @ dump true
  35                     @ addIttfDocument
  36                         function
  37                             param uri
  38                             param content
  39                     @ ittfModelBuildUpScripts
  40                         {
  41                     @ addIttfModelBuildUpScript
  42                         function
  43                             param uri
  44                             param jsScriptCoder
  45                             var uri = uri
  46                             var script = jsScriptCoder.toCode()
  47                             set this.ittfModelBuildUpScripts[uri]
  48                                 {
  49                                     @ uri uri
  50                                     @ script script
  51                             if this.dump
  52                                 _ file.write
  53                                     _ path.join
  54                                         @ path.dirname(uri)
  55                                         @ '_debug'
  56                                         @ path.basename(uri) + '.js.dump'
  57                                     @ script
  58                     @ raiseIttfEvaluationScriptError
  59                         function
  60                             param uri
  61                             param exception
  62                             var uri = uri
  63                             var script = this.ittfModelBuildUpScripts[uri]
  64                             if script && script.ittfEvalScript && exception && exception.lineNumber
  65                                 var lines = script.ittfEvalScript.getErrorLines(exception).join('\n')
  66                                 set exception.message = '\nError evaluating ittf in uri: ' + uri + '\n' + lines + '\n'
  67                             else
  68                                 set exception.message = '\nError evaluating ittf in uri: ' + uri + '\n' + exception.message + '\n'
  69                             # In case of --force proceed inside the try/catch flow
  70                             throw exception

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/folder/copyFolder.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_done
  • tobe_array 
                                

   1 $group
   2     var sourceFolder = "c:/my/starters/copyFolder/source"
   3     var destFolder = "c:/my/starters/copyFolder/dest"
   4     var file_1 = sourceFolder + "/f_1.ittf"
   5     var file_2 = sourceFolder + "/f_2.ittf"
   6     var file_3 = sourceFolder + "/fold/f_3.ittf"
   7     var file_4 = sourceFolder + "/fold/f_4.ittf"
   8     var file_5 = sourceFolder + "/fold/sub/f_5.ittf"
   9     var content = "Hello copyFolder "
  10     describe copy a folder
  11         before-async
  12             _ file.write
  13                 @ file_1
  14                 @ content + 'file_1'
  15             _ file.write
  16                 @ file_2
  17                 @ content + 'file_2'
  18             _ file.write
  19                 @ file_3
  20                 @ content + 'file_3'
  21             _ file.write
  22                 @ file_4
  23                 @ content + 'file_4'
  24             _ file.write
  25                 @ file_5
  26                 @ content + 'file_5'
  27             _ doc.uploadFolder
  28                 @ sourceFolder
  29                 f_cb_done( r )
  30                     log 'doc.uploadFolder', r
  31         it-async should copy a folder
  32             _ doc.copyFolder
  33                 @ sourceFolder
  34                 @ destFolder
  35                 f_cb_done( r )
  36                     log 'doc.copyFolder', r
  37                     tobe_array( r,  5 )

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/folder/deleteFolder.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_done
  • f_cb_test
  • f_cb_no_err
  • tobe_number
  • tobe_true 
                                

   1 $group
   2     var deleteFolderEmpty = "c:/my/starters/mongotest/delete/empty"
   3     var deleteFolder = "c:/my/starters/mongotest/delete"
   4     var file_1 = deleteFolder + "/f_1.js"
   5     var file_2 = deleteFolder + "/f_2.js"
   6     var content = "Hello "
   7     describe delete a folder
   8         before-async
   9             _ file.write
  10                 @ file_1
  11                 @ content + 'file_1'
  12             _ file.write
  13                 @ file_2
  14                 @ content + 'file_2'
  15             _ doc.createFolder
  16                 @ deleteFolderEmpty
  17                 f_cb_test( r )
  18                     log 'doc.createFolder', r
  19                     _ doc.uploadFolder
  20                         @ deleteFolder
  21                         f_cb_done( r )
  22                             log 'doc.uploadFolder', r
  23         it-async should delete an empty folder
  24             _ doc.deleteFolder
  25                 @ deleteFolderEmpty
  26                 f_cb_done( r )
  27                     log 'doc.deleteFolder', err, r
  28                     tobe_true( r.deleted )
  29                     tobe_number( r.n,  1 )
  30                     tobe_number( r.ok,  1 )
  31         it-async should not delete a not empty folder
  32             _ doc.deleteFolder
  33                 @ deleteFolder
  34                 f_cb_no_err( r )
  35                     log 'doc.deleteFolder', err, r
  36                     tobe_true( err.__is_error )
  37                     _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/folder/download.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_done
  • f_cb_test 
                                

   1 $group
   2     var downloadFolder = "c:/my/starters/download"
   3     var file_1 = downloadFolder + "/f_1.js"
   4     var file_2 = downloadFolder + "/f_2.js"
   5     var file_3 = downloadFolder + "/fold/f_3.js"
   6     var file_4 = downloadFolder + "/fold/f_4.js"
   7     var file_5 = downloadFolder + "/fold/sub/f_5.js"
   8     var content = "Hello "
   9     var downloadZipFile = "c:/my/starters/download/zip/zipped.zip"
  10     describe download a folder
  11         before-async
  12             _ file.write
  13                 @ file_1
  14                 @ content + 'file_1'
  15             _ file.write
  16                 @ file_2
  17                 @ content + 'file_2'
  18             _ file.write
  19                 @ file_3
  20                 @ content + 'file_3'
  21             _ file.write
  22                 @ file_4
  23                 @ content + 'file_4'
  24             _ file.write
  25                 @ file_5
  26                 @ content + 'file_5'
  27             _ doc.uploadFolder
  28                 @ downloadFolder
  29                 f_cb_done( r )
  30                     log 'doc.uploadFolder', r
  31         it-async should download c:/my/starters/download
  32             _ file.mkpath(downloadZipFile)
  33             _ doc.downloadFolder
  34                 @ downloadFolder
  35                 f_cb_test( zip )
  36                     log 'doc.downloadFolder', zip
  37                     _ zip.generateNodeStream
  38                         {
  39                             @ type 'nodebuffer'
  40                             @ streamFiles true
  41                         ._ pipe
  42                             @ fs.createWriteStream(downloadZipFile)
  43                             ._ on
  44                                 @ 'finish'
  45                                 function
  46                                     log downloadZipFile + " written."
  47                                     _ done()

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/fsdb/createItem.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_test
  • tobe_string
  • tobe_number
  • tobe_object
  • tobe_null 
                                

   1 $group
   2     describe insert a filesystem item
   3         it-async should insert a root folder
   4             _ fsmongo.insertItem
   5                 {
   6                     @ parentId null
   7                     @ basename 'c:'
   8                     @ dirname null
   9                     @ kind 0
  10                 f_cb_test( r )
  11                     log 'insertItem.r', err, r
  12                     tobe_number( r.insertedCount,  1 )
  13                     tobe_string( r.code,  FSITEM_INSERTED )
  14                     tobe_object( r.item )
  15                     tobe_string( r.item.path,  c: )
  16                     _ done
  17         it-async should get an existing item
  18             _ fsmongo.getItem
  19                 {
  20                     @ parentId null
  21                     @ basename 'c:'
  22                 f_cb_test( r )
  23                     log 'getItem.r', err, r
  24                     tobe_object( r )
  25                     tobe_null( r.parentId )
  26                     tobe_string( r.basename,  c: )
  27                     _ done
  28         it-async should say the item already exists
  29             _ fsmongo.insertItem
  30                 {
  31                     @ parentId null
  32                     @ basename 'c:'
  33                     @ dirname null
  34                     @ kind 0
  35                 f_cb_test( r )
  36                     log 'insertItem.r', err, r
  37                     tobe_string( r.code,  FSITEM_EXISTS )
  38                     tobe_object( r.item )
  39                     tobe_string( r.item.path,  c: )
  40                     _ done
  41         it-async should insert a root child
  42             _ fsmongo.getItem
  43                 {
  44                     @ parentId null
  45                     @ basename 'c:'
  46                 f_cb_test( r )
  47                     _ fsmongo.insertItem
  48                         {
  49                             @ parentId r.parentId
  50                             @ basename 'hello.txt'
  51                             @ dirname r.basename
  52                             @ kind 1
  53                         f_cb_test( r )
  54                             log 'insertItem.r', err, r
  55                             tobe_number( r.insertedCount,  1 )
  56                             tobe_string( r.code,  FSITEM_INSERTED )
  57                             tobe_object( r.item )
  58                             tobe_string( r.item.path,  c:/hello.txt )
  59                             set hellotxt_item = r.item
  60                             _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/async.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params call, arg1|@@null, arg2|@@null, arg3|@@null, arg4|@@null, arg5|@@null, arg6|@@null
   3     _ ${call}
   4         $if arg1 != null
   5             @ ${arg1}
   6         $if arg2 != null
   7             @ ${arg2}
   8         $if arg3 != null
   9             @ ${arg3}
  10         $if arg4 != null
  11             @ ${arg4}
  12         $if arg5 != null
  13             @ ${arg5}
  14         $if arg6 != null
  15             @ ${arg6}
  16         function
  17             param err
  18             param result
  19             if err
  20                 throw new Error()
  21             $hook

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/co_run_test.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params method
   3     it-async ${method}
   4         _ co
   5             function*
   6                 $hook
   7             ._ then
   8                 function
   9                     _ done()
  10             ._ catch
  11                 function
  12                     param err
  13                     _ done()
  14                     _ console.log
  15                         @ 'catched in ${method}.co'
  16                         @ err.message
  17                     throw err

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/co_run.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params method
   3     _ co
   4         function*
   5             $hook
   6         ._ catch
   7             function
   8                 param err
   9                 _ console.log
  10                     @ 'catched in ${method}.co'
  11                     @ err.message
  12                     @ err.stack
  13                 $hook oncatch
  14                 throw err

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/expect_throw_error.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params error
   3     _ expect
   4         function fn
   5             $hook
   6         . to
   7         ._ throwException
   8             function
   9                 param e
  10                 _ expect(e).to.be.a(errors.${error})

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/itasync.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params title, call, arg1|@@null, arg2|@@null, arg3|@@null, arg4|@@null, arg5|@@null, arg6|@@null
   3     _ it
   4         @ "${title}"
   5         function
   6             param done
   7             _ ${call}
   8                 $if arg1 != null
   9                     @ ${arg1}
  10                 $if arg2 != null
  11                     @ ${arg2}
  12                 $if arg3 != null
  13                     @ ${arg3}
  14                 $if arg4 != null
  15                     @ ${arg4}
  16                 $if arg5 != null
  17                     @ ${arg5}
  18                 $if arg6 != null
  19                     @ ${arg6}
  20                 function
  21                     param err
  22                     param result
  23                     $hook

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/mongo_after_async.js.ittf

                                

   1 after-async
   2     if mounted_db
   3         log '***** mongodb start closing'
   4         _ mounted_db.close
   5         set mounted_db = null
   6         log '***** mongodb closed'
   7         _ done
   8     else
   9         _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests/mongodb/t/mongo_before_async.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_test 
                                

   1 before-async
   2     _ MongoClient.connect
   3         @ 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test'
   4         f_cb_test( db )
   5             set mounted_db = db
   6             set fsmongo = new FsMongo(db)
   7             set doc = new Document(fsmongo)
   8             _ db.collection(FSITEMS).drop
   9                 function
  10                     param err
  11                     param result
  12                     if err
  13                         log 'FSITEMS.drop failed'
  14                     else
  15                         log 'FSITEMS.drop result', result
  16                     _ db.collection(DOCUMENTS).drop
  17                         function
  18                             param err
  19                             param result
  20                             if err
  21                                 log 'DOCUMENTS.drop failed'
  22                             else
  23                                 log 'DOCUMENTS.drop result', result
  24                             _ done()

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/fscommon/document/copyFile.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_done 
                                

   1 $group
   2     var sourceFilePath = "c:/my/from/hello.txt"
   3     var destFilePath = "c:/my/to/hello.txt"
   4     var content = 'Hello'
   5     describe copy a file
   6         before-async
   7             _ doc.writeFile
   8                 @ sourceFilePath
   9                 @ content
  10                 f_cb_done( f )
  11         it-async copy hello from to
  12             _ doc.copyFile
  13                 @ sourceFilePath
  14                 @ destFilePath
  15                 f_cb_done( r )
  16                     log 'copy hello from to', r

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/fscommon/document/createFolder.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_done
  • tobe_number 
                                

   1 $group
   2     describe folder creation
   3         it-async should create a folder
   4             _ doc.createFolder
   5                 @ 'c:/my/starters/darvin'
   6                 f_cb_done( f )
   7                     log 'should create a folder', err, f
   8                     tobe_number( f.insertedCount,  1 )
   9         $*
  10         it-async should verify that folder exists
  11             _ doc.isFolder
  12                 @ 'c:/my/starters/darvin'
  13                 f_cb_done( f )
  14                     log 'should verify that folder exists', err, f
  15                     tobe_true( f )
  16         it-async should retrieve a folder
  17             _ doc.getFolder
  18                 @ 'c:/my/starters'
  19                 f_cb_done( f )
  20                     log 'should retrieve a folder', f
  21                     tobe_number( f.kind,  0 )
  22                     tobe_string( f.path,  c:/my/starters )
  23         it-async should delete a folder
  24             _ doc.deleteFolder
  25                 @ 'c:/my/starters/darvin'
  26                 f_cb_done( f )
  27                     log 'should delete a folder', err, f
  28                     tobe_true( f.deleted )
  29                     tobe_number( f.n,  1 )
  30                     tobe_number( f.ok,  1 )
  31         it-async should verify that folder does not exists
  32             _ doc.isFolder
  33                 @ 'c:/my/starters/darvin'
  34                 f_cb_done( f )
  35                     log 'should verify that folder does not exists', f
  36                     tobe_false( f )
  37         *$

   1 $group
   2     var filePathDelete = "c:/my/starters/darvin/hello.md"

   7                 @ filePathDelete

   1 $group
   2     var folderPath = "c:/my/hello"
   3     var filePath = "c:/my/hello.txt"
   4     var content = 'Hello'
   5     describe write a file
   6         before-async
   7             _ doc.createFolder
   8                 @ folderPath
   9                 f_cb_test( f )
  10                     _ doc.writeFile
  11                         @ filePath
  12                         @ content
  13                         f_cb_done( f )
  14         it-async should be a file item

  16                 @ filePath
  17                 f_cb_done( r )
  18                     log 'doc.isFile', r
  19                     tobe_true( r )
  20         it-async should be a folder item
  21             _ doc.isFolder
  22                 @ folderPath
  23                 f_cb_done( r )
  24                     log 'doc.isFolder', r

  • tobe_true

   2     describe folder existence test
   3         it-async should test if a folder exists
   4             _ doc.isFolder

   6                 f_cb_done( f )

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/fscommon/document/readFile.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb 
                                

   1 $group
   2     m readFile
   3         param filePath
   4         param callback
   5         set filePath = normalize(filePath)
   6         var that = this
   7         _ this.fsCommon.getItemByPath
   8             @ filePath
   9             f_cb( fsitem )
  10                 if fsitem == null
  11                     throw Error('MongoFS error. Document does not exists: ' + path)
  12                 elif fsitem.kind == 0
  13                     throw Error('MongoFS error. Cannot read a folder: ' + path)
  14                 else
  15                     that.fsCommon.readDocumentile
  16                         @ fsitem._id
  17                         f_cb( content )
  18                             return
  19                                 _ callback(content)

Fragments

  • f_cb_test
  • f_cb_done 
                                

   1 $group
   2     var oldFolder = "c:/my/starters/darvin/test/rename/old"
   3     var file_1 = oldFolder + "/f1.txt"
   4     var file_1renamed = oldFolder + "/fr.txt"
   5     var content = "Hello rename file "
   6     describe rename a file
   7         before-async
   8             _ doc.writeFile
   9                 @ file_1
  10                 @ content + 'file 1'
  11                 f_cb_done( r )
  12         it-async should rename a file
  13             _ doc.renameFile
  14                 @ file_1
  15                 @ file_1renamed
  16                 f_cb_test( r )
  17                     log 'doc.renameFile', r
  18                     _ doc.readFile
  19                         @ file_1renamed
  20                         f_cb_done( read )
  21                             log 'doc.renameFile read', read

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/fscommon/document/write_read_File.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_done
  • tobe_string
  • tobe_string_value 
                                

   1 $group
   2     var folderPathOld = "c:/my/starters/darvin"
   3     var filePathOld = "c:/my/starters/darvin/hello.md"
   4     var filePathNew = "c:/my/newfolder/readme.md"
   5     var content = "Hello world"
   6     describe write a file
   7         before-async
   8             _ doc.createFolder
   9                 @ folderPathOld
  10                 f_cb_done( f )
  11         it-async should write into a non existing folder
  12             _ doc.writeFile
  13                 @ filePathNew
  14                 @ content
  15                 f_cb_done( r )
  16                     log 'should write a file', err, r
  17                     tobe_string( r.code,  DOCUMENT_WRITTEN )
  18                     tobe_string_value( r.item.content,  content )
  19         $*
  20         it-async should be not modified
  21             _ doc.writeFile
  22                 @ filePathNew
  23                 @ content
  24                 f_cb_done( r )
  25                     log 'should be not modified', err, r
  26                     tobe_string( r.code,  DOCUMENT_NOT_MODIFIED )
  27         it-async should write into an existing folder
  28             _ doc.writeFile
  29                 @ filePathOld
  30                 @ content
  31                 f_cb_done( r )
  32                     log 'should write into an existing folder', err, r
  33                     tobe_string( r.code,  DOCUMENT_WRITTEN )
  34                     tobe_string_value( r.item.content,  content )
  35         it-async should read
  36             _ doc.readFile
  37                 @ filePathOld
  38                 f_cb_done( r )
  39                     log 'should read', err, r
  40                     tobe_string_value( r,  content )
  41         it-async should overwrite an existing file
  42             _ doc.writeFile
  43                 @ filePathOld
  44                 @ content + ' ' + content
  45                 f_cb_done( r )
  46                     log 'should overwrite an existing file', err, r
  47                     tobe_string( r.code,  DOCUMENT_WRITTEN )
  48                     tobe_string_value( r.item.content,  content + ' ' + content )
  49         *$

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/fscommon/fsimpl/writeFile.js.ittf

Fragments

  • f_cb_test
  • tobe_string
  • tobe_true
  • tobe_false 
                                

   1 $group
   2     $params folder:string|""
   3     describe fs write a file
   4         it-async should write an hello file
   5             _ fsimpl.writeFile
   6                 @ '${folder}/folder1/hello.js.ittf'
   7                 @ 'Hello wizzi factory'
   8                 f_cb_test( result )
   9                     log 'tests.mongodb.fsimpl.writeFile, result:', result
  10                     tobe_string( result.code,  'DOCUMENT_WRITTEN' )
  11                     tobe_string( result.item.content,  'Hello wizzi factory' )
  12                     _ done
  13         it-async should read an hello file
  14             _ fsimpl.readFile
  15                 @ '${folder}/folder1/hello.js.ittf'
  16                 f_cb_test( content )
  17                     log 'tests.mongodb.fsimpl.readFile, content:', content
  18                     tobe_string( content,  'Hello wizzi factory' )
  19                     _ done
  20         it-async hello.js.ittf should be a file not a directory
  21             _ fsimpl.stat
  22                 @ '${folder}/folder1/hello.js.ittf'
  23                 f_cb_test( stat )
  24                     log 'tests.mongodb.fsimpl.stat, stat:', stat
  25                     tobe_true( stat.isFile() )
  26                     tobe_false( stat.isDirectory() )
  27                     _ done
  28         it-async ${folder} should be a directory not a file
  29             _ fsimpl.stat
  30                 @ '${folder}'
  31                 f_cb_test( stat )
  32                     log 'tests.mongodb.fsimpl.stat, stat:', stat
  33                     tobe_false( stat.isFile() )
  34                     tobe_true( stat.isDirectory() )
  35                     _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/base_test.js.ittf

   2     $params name
   3     kind jsfile
   4     +
   5     import path
   6     import util
   7     +
   8     var del = require('del')
   9     var expect = require('expect.js')
  10     +

  12     var file = require('wizzi-utils').file
  13     var verify = require('wizzi-utils').verify
  14     +
  15     $hook imports
  16     +
  17     describe ${name}

   2     $params error
   3     _ expect
   4         function fn
   5             $hook
   6         . to
   7         ._ throwException
   8             function
   9                 param e

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/f_cb_done.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params result|notUsed
   3     function
   4         param err
   5         param ${result}
   6         if err
   7             log 'err', err
   8             throw new Error(err.message)
   9         $hook
  10         _ done

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/f_cb_no_err.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params result|notUsed
   3     function
   4         param err
   5         param ${result}
   6         $hook

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/f_cb_test.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params result|notUsed
   3     function
   4         param err
   5         param ${result}
   6         if err
   7             log 'err', err
   8             throw new Error(err.message)
   9         $hook

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/f_cb_throw.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params result|notUsed
   3     function
   4         param err
   5         param ${result}
   6         log 'err', err
   7         if err
   8             throw
   9                 new Error
  10                     _ JSON.stringify
  11                         @ err
  12                         @ null
  13                         @ 2
  14         $hook

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_array.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, length
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be.an('array')
   4     _ expect(${name}.length).to.be(${length})

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_eql.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, value
   3     # loose equality works for objects
   4     _ expect(${name}).to.eql(${value})

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_equal.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params a, b
   3     _ expect(${a}).to.be.equal(${b})

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_false.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be(false)

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_null.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be(null)

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_number.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, value
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be.a('number')
   4     _ expect(${name}).to.be(${value})

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_object.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be.an('object')

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_string_value.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, value
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be.a('string')
   4     _ expect(${name}).to.be(${value})

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_string.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, value|@@null
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be.a('string')
   4     $if value != null
   5         _ expect(${name}).to.be('${value}')

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_true.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be(true)

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_typeof.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, type
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be.a(${type})

.wizzi/ittf/tests/t/tobe_undefined.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name
   3     _ expect(${name}).to.be(undefined)

.wizzi/generate.wfjob.ittf

Fragments

  • wfjob/lib
  • wfjob/examples
  • wfjob/tests
  • wfjob/root 
                                

   1 wfjob wizzi-repo
   2     $
   3         var folders = {
   4             ittf_lib: path.join(__dirname, 'ittf', 'lib')
   5         }
   6         var ittf_meta_folder     = path.join(__dirname, 'ittf', 'meta');
   7         var ittf_root_folder     = path.join(__dirname, 'ittf', 'root');
   8         var ittf_examples_folder = path.join(__dirname, 'ittf', 'examples');
   9         var ittf_tests_folder    = path.join(__dirname, 'ittf', 'tests');
  10         if (isWebpackTarget) {
  11             // var dest_folder           = path.join(__dirname, '..', '..', '..', '..', 'wizzi-browser', 'packages', 'wizzi-repo', 'dist');
  12             var dest_folder           = path.join(__dirname, '..', '..', '..', '..', 'wizzi-browser', 'build', 'wizzi_modules', 'wizzi-repo');
  13         } else {
  14             var dest_folder           = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'dist');
  15         }
  16         folders.dest = dest_folder;
  17     model meta
  18         schema json
  19         src ${ittf_meta_folder}/index.json.ittf
  20     wfjob/lib( &folders )
  21     $include wfjob/examples
  22     $include wfjob/root
  23     $include wfjob/tests
  24     production
  25         dest-folder ${dest_folder}
  26         line-ref ittf-lib
  27         line-ref ittf-root
  28         $if isWebpackTarget == false
  29             line-ref ittf-examples
  30             line-ref ittf-tests

ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $
   3         var versions = {};
   4         versions['wizzi'] = '0.7.22';
   5         versions['wizzi@next'] = '0.7.23';
   6         versions['wizzi-utils'] = '0.7.15';
   7         versions['wizzi-utils@next'] = '0.7.16';
   8         versions['wizzi-mtree'] = '0.7.11';
   9         versions['wizzi-mtree@next'] = '0.7.12';
  10         versions['wizzi-repo'] = '0.7.5';
  11         versions['wizzi-repo@next'] = '0.7.6';
  12         versions['wizzi-js'] = '0.7.8';
  13         versions['wizzi-js@next'] = '0.7.9';
  14         versions['wizzi-web'] = '0.7.9';
  15         versions['wizzi-web@next'] = '0.7.10';
  16         versions['wizzi-core'] = '0.7.3';
  17         versions['wizzi-core@next'] = '0.7.4';
  18         versions['wizzi-meta'] = '0.6.6';
  19         versions['wizzi-meta@next'] = '0.7.0';
  20         versions['wizzi-tools'] = '0.7.3';
  21         versions['wizzi-tools@next'] = '0.7.4';
  22         versions['wizzi-cli'] = '0.0.27';
  23         versions['wizzi-cli@next'] = '0.0.28';
  24         versions['wizzi-demo'] = '0.4.5';
  25         versions['wizzi-demo@next'] = '0.7.1';
  26         versions['wizzi-lab'] = '0.0.0';
  27         versions['wizzi-lab@next'] = '0.0.0';
  28         versions['wizzi-git'] = '0.7.1';
  29         versions['wizzi-git@next'] = '0.7.2';
  30         versions['wizzifactory.github.io'] = '0.7.1';
  31         versions['wizzifactory.github.io@next'] = '0.7.2';
  32         versions['wizzi-helpers'] = '0.7.1';
  33         versions['wizzi-helpers@next'] = '0.7.2';
  34         versions['isomorphic-git'] = '0.55.4';

ample/repo.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params &opt
   3     #
   4     # Example skeleton specific for the 'wizzi-repo' kernel package
   5     #
   6     #
   7         # Examples: ${opt.name}
   8         #
   9     $include example_includes
  10     var createStoreFactory = require('wizzi-repo').createStoreFactory
  11     $if opt.folderLevel == 1
  12         var repoIndex = require('../index')
  13         var json = require('../lib/json/index')
  14         var MongoFsImpl = require('../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  15         var FsMongo = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  16         var Document = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  17     $elif opt.folderLevel == 2
  18         var repoIndex = require('../../index')
  19         var json = require('../../lib/json/index')
  20         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  21         var FsMongo = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  22         var Document = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  23     $elif opt.folderLevel == 3
  24         var repoIndex = require('../../../index')
  25         var json = require('../../../lib/json/index')
  26         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  27         var FsMongo = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  28         var Document = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  29     $hook imports
  30     $hook functions
  31     var ${opt.name}
  32         function
  33             param step_callback
  34             _ heading1
  35                 @ 'EXAMPLE'
  36             $hook
  37     set ${opt.name}.__name = '${opt.name}'
  38     example_prints( ${opt.name},  ${opt.level},  ${opt.step} )
  39     set module.exports = ${opt.name}
  40     if typeof require != 'undefined' && require.main === module
  41         _ ${opt.name}

ample/t/example_prints.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params name, level|0, step|1
   3     function heading1
   4         param text
   5         log ''
   6         log '*'.repeat(120)
   7         log '** level ${level} - step ${step} - ${name} - ' + text
   8         log '*'.repeat(120)
   9         log ''
  10     function heading2
  11         param text
  12         log ''
  13         log '   ', '-'.repeat(100)
  14         log '   ','-- ${name} - ' + text
  15         log '   ', '-'.repeat(100)
  16         log ''
  17     function printArray
  18         param name
  19         param arr
  20         param fields
  21         param format
  22         if format === 'dashes'
  23             log '   ', '-'.repeat(100)
  24         log '   ', '* array ' + name + ' : '
  25         foreach item in arr
  26             log '    {', i
  27             var keys = fields || Object.keys(item)
  28             foreach k in keys
  29                 _ printValue
  30                     @ k
  31                     @ item[k]
  32     function printValue
  33         param k
  34         param v
  35         param format
  36         param p1
  37         log '--- value ------------------------------------------------------ start'
  38         if format === 'dashes' || format === 'meter'
  39             log '   ', '-'.repeat(100)
  40         if format === 'json'
  41             set v
  42                 _ stringify
  43                     @ v
  44                     @ null
  45                     @ 4
  46         if verify.isNotEmpty(v)
  47             var lines
  48                 _ verify.splitLines
  49                     @ v
  50                     {
  51                         @ numbered true
  52             if lines.length === 1
  53                 log '   ', k, ':', lines[0].text
  54             else
  55                 for var i=0; i<lines.length; i++
  56                     if i === 0
  57                         log '   ', k, ':', lines[0].numFmt, lines[0].text
  58                     else
  59                         log '   ', spaces(k.length+1), ' ', lines[i].numFmt, lines[i].text
  60         elif verify.isObject(v)
  61             log '   ', k, ':', util.inspect(v)
  62         else
  63             log '   ', k, ':', v
  64         if format === 'meter'
  65             _ meterLine(p1, '     ' + new Array(1 + k.length).join(' '))
  66         log '--- value ------------------------------------------------------ end'
  67     function printObject
  68         param k
  69         param v
  70         param format
  71         param p1
  72         log '--- object ------------------------------------------------------ start'
  73         if format === 'dashes' || format === 'meter'
  74             log '   ', '-'.repeat(100)
  75         log '   ', k, '{'
  76         _ __printObject(v, 2, 6)
  77         if format === 'meter'
  78             _ meterLine(p1, '     ' + new Array(1 + k.length).join(' '))
  79         log '--- object ------------------------------------------------------ end'
  80     function __printObject
  81         param v
  82         param level
  83         param limit
  84         if level < limit
  85             var indent = new Array(1 + level * 4).join(' ')
  86             var prop
  87             for var k in v
  88                 set prop = v[k]
  89                 if verify.isObject(prop)
  90                     log indent, k, '{'
  91                     _ __printObject(prop, level+1, limit)
  92                 elif verify.isFunction(prop)
  93                     log indent, k, 'function'
  94                 elif verify.isArray(prop)
  95                     log indent, k, '['
  96                     var indent2 = new Array(1 + (level+1) * 4).join(' ')
  97                     foreach item in prop
  98                         if verify.isObject(item)
  99                             _ __printObject(item, level+1, limit)
 100                         elif verify.isFunction(item)
 101                             log indent2, 'function'
 102                         else
 103                             log indent2, item
 104                 else
 105                     log indent, k, prop
 106     function printLines
 107         param lines
 108         log 'lines from liner ----------------------------------- start'
 109         foreach l in lines
 110             log 'line', 'indent: ' + l.indent, 'r,c: ' + l.row + ',' + l.col,
 111                 \b l.name + ' / ' + l.value,
 112                 \b (l.hasMacro ? 'hasMacro' : ''),
 113                 \b (l.tagSuffix ? 'tagSuffix: ' + l.tagSuffix : '')
 114         log 'lines from liner ------------------------------------- end'
 115     function printNodes_deep
 116         param n
 117         param indent
 118         var mTreeModel = n.model || n.mTreeBrick
 119         log ' ', new Array(indent).join('  '), 'r,c: ' + n.row + ',' + n.col,
 120             \b n.name + ' / ' + n.value,
 121             \b (n.hasMacro ? 'hasMacro' : ''),
 122             \b (n.tagSuffix ? 'tagSuffix: ' + n.tagSuffix : ''),
 123             \b (mTreeModel.$params ? '$params: ' + mTreeModel.$params : ''),
 124             \b (mTreeModel.sourceKey ? 'sk: ' + mTreeModel.sourceKey : '')
 125         foreach c in n.children
 126             _ printNodes_deep
 127                 @ c
 128                 @ indent + 1
 129     function printNodes
 130         param nodes
 131         param title
 132         log '--- nodes ' + (title || '') + ' ------------------------------------------------- start'
 133         if nodes.length != 1
 134             log 'Invalid nodes array, must be of length == 1'
 135         else
 136             # log 'nodes.mTreeBrick', nodes[0].mTreeBrick
 137             # log 'nodes[0]', nodes[0]
 138             var mTreeModel = nodes[0].model || nodes[0].mTreeBrick
 139             if mTreeModel
 140                 log ' ', 'nodes.uri', mTreeModel.uri
 141                 log ' ', 'nodes.$schema', mTreeModel.$schema
 142                 log ' ', 'nodes.sourceKey', mTreeModel.sourceKey
 143                 if mTreeModel.$params
 144                     log ' ', 'nodes.$params', mTreeModel.$params
 145                 if mTreeModel.frontMatter
 146                     log ' ', 'nodes.frontMatter', mTreeModel.frontMatter
 147             _ printNodes_deep
 148                 @ nodes[0]
 149                 @ 1
 150         log '--- nodes ' + (title || '') + ' --------------------------------------------------- end'
 151     function printEvaluatedNodes_deep
 152         param n
 153         param indent
 154         log ' ', new Array(indent).join('  '), 'r,c: ' + n.r + ',' + n.c,
 155             \b n.n + ' / ' + n.v,
 156             \b 'sk: ' + n.s,
 157             \b 'u: ' + n.u
 158         foreach c in n.children
 159             _ printEvaluatedNodes_deep
 160                 @ c
 161                 @ indent + 1
 162     function printEvaluatedNodes
 163         param evaluated
 164         param title
 165         log '--- evaluated nodes ' + (title || '') + ' ------------------------------------------------- start'
 166         if evaluated && evaluated.nodes && evaluated.nodes.length == 1
 167             if evaluated.frontMatter
 168                 log ' ', 'evaluated.frontMatter', evaluated.frontMatter
 169             _ printEvaluatedNodes_deep
 170                 @ evaluated.nodes[0]
 171                 @ 1
 172         else
 173             log 'Invalid evaluated object', evaluated
 174         log '--- evaluated nodes ' + (title || '') + ' --------------------------------------------------- end'
 175     function spaces
 176         param len
 177         return new Array(len).join(' ')
 178     function meterLine
 179         param len
 180         param indent
 181         var sb = []
 182         var numW = len < 10 ? 1 : ( len < 100 ? 2 : 3 )
 183         var x
 184         for var i=0; i<numW; i++
 185             for var j=0; j<len; j++
 186                 set x = formatNum(j, numW)
 187                 _ sb.push(x.substr(i,1))
 188             log indent, sb.join('')
 189             set sb = []
 190     function formatNum
 191         param num
 192         param len
 193         var x = num.toString()
 194         return new Array(1 + len-x.length).join(' ') + x

ample/t/example_includes.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     var util = require('util')
   3     var path = require('path')
   4     var fs = require('fs')
   5     var stringify = require('json-stringify-safe')
   6     var wizziUtils = require('wizzi-utils')
   7     # local disk filesystem
   8     var file = wizziUtils.file
   9     # virtual filesystem
  10     var vfile = require('wizzi-utils').vfile
  11     # defaults to local disk filesystem
  12     var fsfile = vfile()
  13     # utilities
  14     var verify = wizziUtils.verify
  15     var mocks = wizziUtils.mocks

ample/repo.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params &opt
   3     #
   4     # Example skeleton specific for the 'wizzi-repo' kernel package
   5     #
   6     #
   7         # Examples: ${opt.name}
   8         #
   9     $include example_includes
  10     var createStoreFactory = require('wizzi-repo').createStoreFactory
  11     $if opt.folderLevel == 1
  12         var repoIndex = require('../index')
  13         var json = require('../lib/json/index')
  14         var MongoFsImpl = require('../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  15         var FsMongo = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  16         var Document = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  17     $elif opt.folderLevel == 2
  18         var repoIndex = require('../../index')
  19         var json = require('../../lib/json/index')
  20         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  21         var FsMongo = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  22         var Document = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  23     $elif opt.folderLevel == 3
  24         var repoIndex = require('../../../index')
  25         var json = require('../../../lib/json/index')
  26         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  27         var FsMongo = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  28         var Document = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  29     $hook imports
  30     $hook functions
  31     var ${opt.name}
  32         function
  33             param step_callback
  34             _ heading1
  35                 @ 'EXAMPLE'
  36             $hook
  37     set ${opt.name}.__name = '${opt.name}'
  38     example_prints( ${opt.name},  ${opt.level},  ${opt.step} )
  39     set module.exports = ${opt.name}
  40     if typeof require != 'undefined' && require.main === module
  41         _ ${opt.name}

ample/repo.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params &opt
   3     #
   4     # Example skeleton specific for the 'wizzi-repo' kernel package
   5     #
   6     #
   7         # Examples: ${opt.name}
   8         #
   9     $include example_includes
  10     var createStoreFactory = require('wizzi-repo').createStoreFactory
  11     $if opt.folderLevel == 1
  12         var repoIndex = require('../index')
  13         var json = require('../lib/json/index')
  14         var MongoFsImpl = require('../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  15         var FsMongo = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  16         var Document = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  17     $elif opt.folderLevel == 2
  18         var repoIndex = require('../../index')
  19         var json = require('../../lib/json/index')
  20         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  21         var FsMongo = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  22         var Document = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  23     $elif opt.folderLevel == 3
  24         var repoIndex = require('../../../index')
  25         var json = require('../../../lib/json/index')
  26         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  27         var FsMongo = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  28         var Document = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  29     $hook imports
  30     $hook functions
  31     var ${opt.name}
  32         function
  33             param step_callback
  34             _ heading1
  35                 @ 'EXAMPLE'
  36             $hook
  37     set ${opt.name}.__name = '${opt.name}'
  38     example_prints( ${opt.name},  ${opt.level},  ${opt.step} )
  39     set module.exports = ${opt.name}
  40     if typeof require != 'undefined' && require.main === module
  41         _ ${opt.name}

ample/repo.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params &opt
   3     #
   4     # Example skeleton specific for the 'wizzi-repo' kernel package
   5     #
   6     #
   7         # Examples: ${opt.name}
   8         #
   9     $include example_includes
  10     var createStoreFactory = require('wizzi-repo').createStoreFactory
  11     $if opt.folderLevel == 1
  12         var repoIndex = require('../index')
  13         var json = require('../lib/json/index')
  14         var MongoFsImpl = require('../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  15         var FsMongo = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  16         var Document = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  17     $elif opt.folderLevel == 2
  18         var repoIndex = require('../../index')
  19         var json = require('../../lib/json/index')
  20         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  21         var FsMongo = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  22         var Document = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  23     $elif opt.folderLevel == 3
  24         var repoIndex = require('../../../index')
  25         var json = require('../../../lib/json/index')
  26         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  27         var FsMongo = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  28         var Document = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  29     $hook imports
  30     $hook functions
  31     var ${opt.name}
  32         function
  33             param step_callback
  34             _ heading1
  35                 @ 'EXAMPLE'
  36             $hook
  37     set ${opt.name}.__name = '${opt.name}'
  38     example_prints( ${opt.name},  ${opt.level},  ${opt.step} )
  39     set module.exports = ${opt.name}
  40     if typeof require != 'undefined' && require.main === module
  41         _ ${opt.name}

oj_gitignore.text.ittf

                                

   1 text
   2     .DS_Store
   3     .nodemonignore
   4     .sass-cache/
   5     npm-debug.log
   6     node_modules/
   7     public/lib
   8     app/tests/coverage/
   9     .bower-*/
  10     .idea/
  11     .bin/
  12     .obj/
  13     obj/
  14     bin/
  15     Properties/
  16     private/

rnel.md.ittf

                                

   1 md
   2     $params name, title
   3     h1 ${name}
   4     br
   5     p ${title}
   6     br
   7     workinprogress()
   8     $hook
   9     wf()
  10     h2 Built With
  11     ul
  12         li
  13             a Nodejs
  14                 href https://nodejs.org
  15         li
  16             a Wizzi
  17                 href https://github.com/stfnbssl/wizzi
  18     br
  19     license()

t_license.text.ittf

                                

   1 text
   2     $params copy
   3     MIT License
   4     br
   5     Copyright (c) ${copy}
   6     br
   7     Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
   8     of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal
   9     in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights
  10     to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell
  11     copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is
  12     furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:
  13     br
  14     The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in
  15     all copies or substantial portions of the Software.
  16     br
  17     THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR
  18     IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,
  19     FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE
  20     AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER
  21     LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM,
  22     OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN
  23     THE SOFTWARE.

rnel_package.json.ittf

                                

   1 {
   2     $params pkgName, version, description, license|MIT
   3     $include versions
   4     name "${pkgName}"
   5     sideEffects false
   6     $if isWebpackTarget == false
   7         version "${version}"
   8     description "${description}"
   9     author
  10         {
  11             name "Stefano Bassoli"
  12             email "stfn.bssl@gmail.com"
  13     private false
  14     licenses
  15         [
  16             $if license == 'MIT'
  17             {
  18                 type "MIT"
  19                 url "https://github.com/stfnbssl/wizzi/tree/master/license.txt"
  20     repository
  21         {
  22             type "git"
  23             url "https://github.com/stfnbssl/wizzi/tree/master/packages/${pkgName}"
  24     engines
  25         {
  26             node ">=0.10.28"
  27             npm ">=1.4.28"
  28     scripts
  29         {
  30             test "mocha tests/all/**/*.js --full-trace"
  31             test:quick "mocha tests/quick/**/*.js --full-trace"
  32             $hook scripts
  33     dependencies
  34         {
  35             async "^3.2.0"
  36             chalk "^4.1.0"
  37             iconv-lite "^0.6.2"
  38             json-stringify-safe "^5.0.1"
  39             lodash "^4.17.20"
  40             $if isWebpackTarget == false
  41                 wizzi-utils "${versions['wizzi-utils']}"
  42             $hook
  43     devDependencies
  44         {
  45             del "^6.0.0"
  46             expect.js "^0.3.1"
  47             $hook devDependencies

ample/repo.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params &opt
   3     #
   4     # Example skeleton specific for the 'wizzi-repo' kernel package
   5     #
   6     #
   7         # Examples: ${opt.name}
   8         #
   9     $include example_includes
  10     var createStoreFactory = require('wizzi-repo').createStoreFactory
  11     $if opt.folderLevel == 1
  12         var repoIndex = require('../index')
  13         var json = require('../lib/json/index')
  14         var MongoFsImpl = require('../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  15         var FsMongo = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  16         var Document = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  17     $elif opt.folderLevel == 2
  18         var repoIndex = require('../../index')
  19         var json = require('../../lib/json/index')
  20         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  21         var FsMongo = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  22         var Document = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  23     $elif opt.folderLevel == 3
  24         var repoIndex = require('../../../index')
  25         var json = require('../../../lib/json/index')
  26         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  27         var FsMongo = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  28         var Document = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  29     $hook imports
  30     $hook functions
  31     var ${opt.name}
  32         function
  33             param step_callback
  34             _ heading1
  35                 @ 'EXAMPLE'
  36             $hook
  37     set ${opt.name}.__name = '${opt.name}'
  38     example_prints( ${opt.name},  ${opt.level},  ${opt.step} )
  39     set module.exports = ${opt.name}
  40     if typeof require != 'undefined' && require.main === module
  41         _ ${opt.name}

rkinprogress.md.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     h2 Work still in progress
   3     br
   4     p Availability of features will be announced
   5     p on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/wizziteam) and [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/wizzifactory)
   6     br

.md.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     h2 Wizzi
   3     br
   4     p One machinery, many productions.
   5     br
   6     p
   7         a Project page
   8             href https://stfnbssl.github.io/wizzi

cense.md.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     h2 License
   3     p This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the \b
   4         a license.txt
   5             href license.txt
   6         span \b for details.

ample/repo.js.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params &opt
   3     #
   4     # Example skeleton specific for the 'wizzi-repo' kernel package
   5     #
   6     #
   7         # Examples: ${opt.name}
   8         #
   9     $include example_includes
  10     var createStoreFactory = require('wizzi-repo').createStoreFactory
  11     $if opt.folderLevel == 1
  12         var repoIndex = require('../index')
  13         var json = require('../lib/json/index')
  14         var MongoFsImpl = require('../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  15         var FsMongo = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  16         var Document = require('../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  17     $elif opt.folderLevel == 2
  18         var repoIndex = require('../../index')
  19         var json = require('../../lib/json/index')
  20         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  21         var FsMongo = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  22         var Document = require('../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  23     $elif opt.folderLevel == 3
  24         var repoIndex = require('../../../index')
  25         var json = require('../../../lib/json/index')
  26         var MongoFsImpl = require('../../../lib/mongodb/mongoFsimpl')
  27         var FsMongo = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/fsmongo')
  28         var Document = require('../../../lib/mongodb/fs/document')
  29     $hook imports
  30     $hook functions
  31     var ${opt.name}
  32         function
  33             param step_callback
  34             _ heading1
  35                 @ 'EXAMPLE'
  36             $hook
  37     set ${opt.name}.__name = '${opt.name}'
  38     example_prints( ${opt.name},  ${opt.level},  ${opt.step} )
  39     set module.exports = ${opt.name}
  40     if typeof require != 'undefined' && require.main === module
  41         _ ${opt.name}

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params result|notUsed
   3     =>
   4         param err
   5         param ${result}
   6         if err
   7             return
   8                 _ callback
   9                     @ err
  10         $hook

tf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params &folders
   3     line ittf-lib
   4         cwd-folder ${folders.ittf_lib}
   5         dest-folder ${folders.dest}/lib
   6         any_js()
   7             ignore ${folders.ittf_lib}/**/*__copy/**/*.js.ittf
   8             model-ref meta
   9                 export-name wfpackage
  10         artifact any_ittf_inside___copy
  11             src ${folders.ittf_lib}/**/*__copy/**/*.ittf
  12             extension ittf
  13         $hook

ob.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     line ittf-examples
   3         cwd-folder ${ittf_examples_folder}
   4         dest-folder ${dest_folder}/examples
   5         any_js()
   6             ignore ${ittf_examples_folder}/**/*__copy/**/*.js.ittf
   7         any_json()
   8             ignore ${ittf_examples_folder}/**/*__copy/**/*.json.ittf
   9         artifact any_ittf_inside___copy
  10             src ${ittf_examples_folder}/**/*__copy/**/*.ittf
  11             extension ittf

ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     line ittf-tests
   3         cwd-folder ${ittf_tests_folder}
   4         dest-folder ${dest_folder}/tests
   5         any_js()
   6             ignore ${ittf_tests_folder}/**/*__copy/**/*.js.ittf
   7         artifact any_ittf_inside___copy
   8             src ${ittf_tests_folder}/**/*__copy/**/*.ittf
   9             extension ittf
  10         $include any_tests_ittf

ttf

                                

   1 $group
   2     line ittf-root
   3         cwd-folder ${ittf_root_folder}
   4         dest-folder ${dest_folder}
   5         any_js()
   6             ignore ${ittf_root_folder}/**/*__copy.*/**/*.js.ittf
   7             model-ref meta
   8                 export-name wfpackage
   9         any_json()
  10             model-ref meta
  11                 export-name wfpackage
  12         any_md()
  13             model-ref meta
  14                 export-name wfpackage
  15         any_text()
  16             model-ref meta
  17                 export-name wfpackage
  18         artifact .gitignore
  19             src .gitignore.text.ittf
  20             schema text
  21             generator text/document
  22             dest-path .gitignore
  23             extension gitignore
  24         any_plain( ps1)
  25         any_plain_d_ts()
  26         $hook

.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params isPackage:boolean|false
   3     artifact any_js
   4         src ./**/*.js.ittf
   5         schema js
   6         generator js/module
   7         extension js
   8         $if isPackage
   9             model-ref meta
  10                 export-name wfpackage
  11         $hook

tf.wfjob.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     artifact any_tests_ittf
   3         src ./**/*.tests.ittf
   4         extension ittf

ob.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     artifact any_json
   3         src ./**/*.json.ittf
   4         schema json
   5         generator json/document
   6         extension json
   7         $hook

.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     artifact any_md
   3         src ./**/*.md.ittf
   4         schema md
   5         generator md/document
   6         extension md
   7         $hook

ob.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     artifact any_text
   3         src ./**/*.text.ittf
   4         schema text
   5         generator text/document
   6         extension txt
   7         $hook

job.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     $params ext
   3     artifact any_plain_${ext}
   4         src ./**/*.${ext}
   5         extension ${ext}

ts.wfjob.ittf

                                

   1 $group
   2     artifact any_plain_d_ts
   3         src ./**/*.d.ts
   4         extension ts
×
